Job1:12 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mwĩai Ngai weeie Satani atĩĩ, “Nũseo ĩndĩ, nĩngũũnenga ũtonyi wa kwananga syĩndũ sya Yovu syonthe. Ĩndĩ ndũkatate kũmũũmĩsya we mwene.” Kwoou Satani nĩwaumie vala Mwĩai Ngai waĩ na athi." 
Job1:13 Mũthenya ũmwe, yĩla ana na eĩtu ma Yovu maendee kũtanĩa mbokanĩ mũsyĩ kwa mwana ũla mũkũũ wa Yovu," 
Job1:14 mũtũmwa ũmwe nĩwookie vala ve Yovu, na amwĩa atĩĩ, “Yĩla tũkũĩmaa na nzaũ, mang'oi maiya o vau vakuvĩ," 
Job1:15 Aseva nĩmaivithũkĩa na masyũya syonthe, nĩmatemanga athũkũmi maku onthe na ũvyũ mamoaa. No inyie nĩ nyioka navonoka ngũtavye ũvoo ũũ.”" 
Job1:16 Mũtũmwa ũsu aendee kũneena, mũthũkũmi ũngĩ nĩwookie na asya atĩĩ, “Nĩkwatisa, na ũtisi ũsu wooaa malondu onthe na aĩthi onthe. No inyie nĩ nyioka navonoka ngũtavye ũvoo ũũ.”" 
Job1:17 Ũsu nake aendee kũneena, mũthũkũmi ũngĩ nĩwookie na asya atĩĩ, “Nguthu itatũ sya ing'ei kuma Kalitei nĩsyatũvithũkĩa. Ing'ei isu nĩsyooya ngamĩle na syatemanga athũkũmi maku onthe na ũvyũ syamoaa. No inyie nĩ nyioka navonoka ngũtavye ũvoo ũũ.”" 
Job1:18 Mũthũkũmi ũsu aendee kũneena, mũthũkũmi ũngĩ nĩwookie na asya atĩĩ, “Ana maku na eĩtu maku metanĩaa mboka mũsyĩ kwa mwana ũla waku mũkũũ," 
Job1:19 na kĩseve kĩna vinya, nĩkyauutana kuma weũnĩ. Kĩseve kĩu nĩkyauutana kyavalũkya nyũmba yatumba andũ onthe makw'a. No inyie nĩ nyioka navonoka ngũtavye ũvoo ũũ.”" 
Job1:20 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wookĩlile na atembũanga ngũa yake nĩ kyeva. Nĩweenzie mũtwe wake, na eevalũkya nthĩ anenge Ngai ndaĩa." 
Job1:21 Nĩwaneenie asya atĩĩ, “Nasyaiwe nde kĩndũ, na ngakw'a nde kĩndũ. Mwĩai Ngai nĩwanengie, Mwĩai Ngai nĩwoosa. Syĩtwa ya Mwĩai Ngai nĩyĩtaĩwe.”" 
Job1:22 O na maũndũ asu onthe meekĩka, Yovu ndaaĩka naĩ kana akatũla Ngai mũtĩ." 
Job2:1 Yĩla mũthenya ũngĩ wavikie wa syũmbe sya ĩtunĩ kũka mbee wa Mwĩai Ngai, Satani o nake aĩ vo." 
Job2:2 Mwĩai Ngai nĩwakũlilye Satani atĩĩ, “Wauma va?” Satani nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa, “Numĩte kwanganga kũũ na kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ.”" 
Job2:3 Mwĩai Ngai amũkũlya atĩĩ, “Nĩwonie Yovu mũthũkũmi wakwa? Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ vai mũndũ ũilyĩ take. Nĩ mũndũ ũtatũlwa mũtĩ na nĩ mũlũngalu. E kĩkĩo kya Ngai na nĩwĩsũvĩaa ndakeke ũndũ ũthũku. We Satani nũnambĩsũvie ngũeke ũthi ũkamũvithũkĩe vate kĩtumi o na kĩmwe. Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo, Yovu nĩ mũĩkĩĩku o tondũ ũnailyĩ mbeenĩ.”" 
Job2:4 Satani nĩwamũsũngĩie amwĩa atĩĩ, “Kĩkonde vandũ va kĩkonde! Ĩĩ, kyonthe kĩla mũndũ wĩ nakyo nũkĩnenganae aisũvĩa thayũ wake." 
Job2:5 Ĩndĩ yu watata kũkiita mwĩĩ wake ekũuma methonĩ.” 
Job2:6 Kwoou Mwĩai Ngai nĩweeie Satani atĩĩ, “Nũseo ĩndĩ, nĩnanengane Yovu ũtonyinĩ waku, ĩndĩ ndũkamũae.”" 
Job2:7 Kwoou Satani nĩwaumie vala ve Mwĩai Ngai na athi. Satani nĩwatumie Yovu akwatwa nĩ mĩimũ mwĩĩnĩ wake w'onthe. 
Job2:8 Yovu nĩwaendie ekala vala mũu wekaw'a na oosa kĩlĩo ethũe nakyo. 
Job2:9 Mũka wa Yovu nĩwamũkũlilye atĩĩ, “Ũendee kwĩthĩwa wĩo mũĩkĩĩku o tondũ wailyĩ mbeenĩ? Wĩlea kũuma Ngai ũkakw'a nĩkĩ?”" 
Job2:10 Yovu nĩwasũngĩie mũka amwĩa atĩĩ, “Wĩneena ta ũmwe wa aka ala atumanu. Yĩla Ngai watwĩka ũndũ ũseo nĩtũwĩtĩkĩlaa. Tũtonya ata ĩndĩ kũnyungunyĩsya Ngai atwĩka ũndũ ũthũku?” O na Yovu athĩnĩte ũu, ndaaĩtĩkĩla kũvĩtya kwa kũneenea Ngai ndeto nthũku." 
Job2:11 Yovu aĩ na anyanyae atatũ. Anyanyae asu maĩ Elivasi kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani, Mbilitati kuma nthĩ ya Sui na Nzovali kuma nthĩ ya Naama. Yĩla anyanyae asu ma Yovu meewie ũndũ wĩ na thĩna wĩana, nĩmatwie kyathĩ kya kũthi kũmũkiakisya na kũmwĩkĩa vinya." 
Job2:12 Yĩla mookĩlilye metho me vaasa, nĩmoonie Yovu ĩndĩ mayaamũmanya. Nĩmaĩie na wasya mũnene na matembũanga ngũa syoo sya ĩũlũ nĩ kyeva, na mekya kĩtoo ĩũlũ na mĩtwenĩ yoo." 
Job2:13 Nĩvo ĩndĩ mekalile nthĩ me na Yovu vandũ va mĩthenya mũonza, ũtukũ na mũthenya matekũneena ũndũ na Yovu, nũndũ wa kwona ũndũ wathĩnĩte mũno wĩana." 
Job3:1 Ĩtina wa ũu, Yovu nĩwambĩĩie kũneena ayĩumanĩa mũthenya ũla wasyaiwe." 
Job3:2 Yovu aneenie ayasya ũũ: 
Job3:3 “Mũthenya ũla nasyaiwe nĩ wae vyũ, ũtukũ ũla kweeiwe, ‘Kavĩsĩ nĩkaitavwa!’" 
Job3:4 Mũthenya ũsu nĩwaĩe kĩvindunĩ, Ngai ũla wĩ ĩũlũ, ndakaaũlilikane; o na ndũkaaĩthĩwe na kyeni ĩngĩ." 
Job3:5 Nũkwatwe ĩngĩ nĩ wiki na kĩvindu kĩkamu; nũvw'ĩkwe nĩ matu, na syũa yĩikae." 
Job3:6 Ũtukũ ũsu, nũkwatwe nĩ kĩvindu kĩkamu, o na ndũkaatalwe mĩthenyanĩ ya mwaka, kana kũtalwa mĩthenyanĩ ya Mwei." 
Job3:7 Ũtukũ ũsu ũtw'ĩke ngũngũ, vaikethĩwe na wasya wa ũtanu nthĩnĩ waw'o." 
Job3:8 Ala maumanĩaa mĩthenya maũumanĩe. Ala meyũmbanĩtye kũthokoa Leviathani. 
Job3:9 Ndata ya kwakya ya ũtukũ ũsu ndĩkaumye kyeni kyayo, ũtukũ ũsu ndũkanengwe wĩkwatyo wa kũkya, kana kwona kyeni kya mbee kya kwakya." 
Job3:10 Nĩkwĩthĩwa ndwaavinga ĩvu ya mwaitũ ngalea kũsyawa, kana kũmbitha ndikakwatwe nĩ thĩna kana kyeva." 
Job3:11 Nĩ kavaa kethĩwa nakw'ĩĩe ĩvunĩ ya mwaitũ, kana kethĩwa nakwie nasyawa oou." 
Job3:12 Nĩkĩ vaĩ mau ma kũnthokya? Kana nĩkĩ vaĩ nondo ndonya kwonga? 
Job3:13 Nũndũ kethĩwa nĩnakwie ĩvinda yĩu, yu nĩthĩwa nthũmũĩte." 
Job3:14 Nĩthĩwa vamwe na asumbĩ na atongoi ma nthĩ, ala meeyakĩie ĩngĩ nyũmba sya tene sya kĩ-ũsumbĩ," 
Job3:15 kana nĩ na asumbĩ ala mausũasya nyũmba syoo na thaavu, ala mausũasya nyũmba syoo na silĩva." 
Job3:16 Naemie kũsyawa nĩ kĩvuno nĩkĩ, ĩĩ, ta kana kasyaĩtwe ke kakw'ũ?" 
Job3:17 Mbũanĩ nĩvo andũ athũku maekeaa kwĩka naĩ, na athũkũmi ala manoete maithũmũa." 
Job3:18 O na ala ove yela nĩmakwataa mũuo vo, mayĩw'aa wasya wa mũnene woo aimakandĩa." 
Job3:19 Andũ onthe me vo, me nguma na ala matesĩkĩe, na ngombo nĩsyovoaw'a kuma kwa anene moo." 
Job3:20 Ala mekũthĩna maendeeaa kwĩkala thayũ nĩkĩ? Ala me na kyeva maendeeaa kwĩkala thayũ nĩkĩ? 
Job3:21 Meteelaa kĩkw'ũ, ĩndĩ kĩyĩsaa kũka, mamanthaa kĩkw'ũ mbee wa ũndũ mũndũ ũmanthaa ũthwii mũvithe." 
Job3:22 Mayĩthĩawa na ũtanu, nginya yĩla meĩthĩwa me akw'ũ na maithikwa." 
Job3:23 Ngai nũmavithaa ĩvinda yoo yĩla yũkĩte, na kũmavinganĩsya ngalĩko syonthe." 
Job3:24 Kĩĩo kyakwa nĩkĩtw'ĩkĩte lĩu wakwa, na kũluma kwakwa kũithelaa." 
Job3:25 Nũndũ ũndũ ũla ngĩaa nĩwĩkĩkĩte vala nĩĩ, na ũla ngĩaa mũno ũkambũkĩa." 
Job3:26 Ndi na mũuo, vai ũthũmũo, na mathĩna makwa maithelaa nongi.”" 
Job4:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani wasũngĩie Yovu amwĩa atĩĩ," 
Job4:2 “Mũndũ ũkũtavya ũndũ nĩwĩw'a woo? Nditonya kũendeea kũkilya. 
Job4:3 Sũanĩa ũndũ ũmanyĩĩtye andũ maingĩvĩte, ũndũ wĩkĩĩte vinya moko maleelu." 
Job4:4 Ndeto syaku nitw'ĩĩkaa ũla ũkilĩlye kũvalũka, nũmwĩkĩĩte vinya ũla wĩna mau monzu." 
Job4:5 Yu nĩ ĩvinda yaku ya thĩna, ndwĩ na wũmĩĩsyo; ũndũ ũsu nũkũkwatĩte na wĩ na kĩũũyũ." 
Job4:6 Kĩkĩo kya Ngai, ũĩkĩĩku waku, na kwĩthĩwa ũtatũlwa mũtĩ nĩkw'o wĩkwatyo waku." 
Job4:7 Kwasũanĩa yu, weta ĩvinda o na yĩmwe, yĩla mũndũ mũlũngalu waathĩna." 
Job4:8 Nĩnonete andũ maiĩmĩa ũthũku na kũvanda thĩna; yu meketha ũthũku na thĩna. 
Job4:9 Ta kĩuutani kĩnene, Ngai nũmanangaa, nũndũ wa woo wake." 
Job4:10 Andũ athũku nĩmalulumaa na kũkooma ta mĩnyambũ, ĩndĩ Ngai nũmavindĩthasya na kũtũla maeo moo." 
Job4:11 Ta mĩnyambũ ĩte na kĩndũ ĩtonya kũaa na kũya, nĩmakusaa na syana syoo iinyaĩĩka." 
Job4:12 “Ĩvinda yĩmwe nĩnakwatie ũtũmani wa kĩmbithĩ, neewie ũtũmani ũsu na kĩwe." 
Job4:13 Ũtukũ ũmwe ngomete ngĩota, yĩla andũ methĩawa makomete makalĩkwa vyũ," 
Job4:14 nĩnakwatiwe nĩ w'ĩa na kĩtetemo, na syatuma mavĩndĩ makwa mathingitha." 
Job4:15 Nĩneewie kaũseve kavĩtĩla ũthyũ, na maw'ĩa makwa maũngama nĩ w'ĩa." 
Job4:16 Nĩnoonaa kĩndũ kĩũngamĩte vau, nĩnasyaisye nesa na ndyaamanya nĩ kyaũ. Nĩkwakilĩtye na ĩndĩ neew'a wasya:" 
Job4:17 ‘Ve mũndũ wĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu mbee wa Ngai? Mũndũ nĩwĩthĩwa e mũtheu mbee wa Mũmbi wake? 
Job4:18 Ethĩwa Ngai ndaĩkĩĩaa athũkũmi make, na ethĩwa nĩwonaa mavĩtyo alaĩkanĩ make," 
Job4:19 wĩsũanĩa akaĩkĩĩa syũmbe sya yũmba, ila wumo wasyo nĩ kĩtoo, ila ikusaa vate vinya, o tondũ mũndũ wũaa kĩmbalutya?" 
Job4:20 Mũndũ nũtonya kwĩthĩwa e thayũ kwakya, na kũtanatuka aithela tene na tene vate mũndũ eĩsĩ ũu." 
Job4:21 Kyonthe kĩla wĩ nakyo nĩkyosawa; akusaa o na atanamba kwĩthĩwa na ũĩ.’” 
Job5:1 “Yovu, ĩtana yu; ve mũndũ ũkũũsũngĩa? Nĩ mũlaĩka wĩva ũtonya kũmũkũlya akũtethye?" 
Job5:2 Kwa w'o, ũthatu nĩwũaa ndia, kĩwĩu nĩkyũaa ala matonya kũluluutĩkw'a mĩtũkĩ." 
Job5:3 Nĩnonete ndia ĩilyĩ ta mbĩanĩe, ĩndĩ kwa mĩtũkĩ nĩnaumanĩie wĩkalo wayo." 
Job5:4 Syana syayo iyĩthĩawa ũsũvĩonĩ, nisindawa makoani kĩsilĩlonĩ, na vai mũndũ witeteaa." 
Job5:5 Kĩla ndia yaketha, nĩkĩĩsawa nĩ ala me na nzaa, o na kĩla yaketha mĩw'anĩ. Ala me na waũni nĩmendeeaw'a nĩ ũthwii wayo." 
Job5:6 Nũndũ ũthũku ndwĩanaa kuma mũthanganĩ, kana thĩna ũkeana kuma nthĩ." 
Job5:7 Aiee, mũndũ nĩwe wĩyĩeteae mathĩna, o tondũ ngala italĩkaa kuma mwakinĩ." 
Job5:8 “Ĩndĩ kethĩwa ninyie, nĩthĩwa ngĩkaĩla Ngai, na ngĩmũtavya thĩna wakwa;" 
Job5:9 Tũitonya kũelewa nĩ maũndũ manene ala Ngai wĩkaa, maũndũ ma kũseng'ya matatalĩka:" 
Job5:10 Nĩwuasya mbua ĩũlũ wa nthĩ, na ainyithya mĩũnda." 
Job5:11 Nũnenevasya ala menyivasya, na kũtanĩthya ala me na kĩĩo." 
Job5:12 Nĩwanangaa mĩvango ya nzeleke, ũkethĩa wĩa woo ndwĩ na ũsyao." 
Job5:13 Nũkwatĩasya ala oĩ ũselekenĩ woo, na kwananga vyũ mĩvango ya ala ai." 
Job5:14 Nĩmonaa kĩvindu mũthenya, na kũthi mavavatĩte mũthenya katĩ ta kwĩ ũtukũ." 
Job5:15 Ĩndĩ Ngai nũtangĩĩaa ngya kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ, nũtangĩĩaa athĩni kuma mathĩnanĩ moo." 
Job5:16 Kwoou nũnengae ngya wĩkwatyo, na aivindĩthya ala athũku." 
Job5:17 “Mũndũ ũla ũkanaw'a nĩ Ngai e vaseo, kwoou ndũkathate yĩla Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe waũkany'a." 
Job5:18 Nũndũ nũũmĩasya na ayova kũla waũmĩsya, kw'oko kwake nĩkũũmĩasya na kw'oko kwake kũivosya." 
Job5:19 Walika mũisyonĩ akakũtetheeasya ĩvinda yonthe; o na wĩ thĩnanĩ mũnene akakũsũvĩa ndũkaũmĩw'e. 
Job5:20 Kwooka yũa, akakwovosya kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ, na ĩvindanĩ ya kau, akakũsũvĩa ndũkakw'e." 
Job5:21 Ngai akakũsũvĩana na nzukũ nthũku, akakũtangĩĩa yĩla wanangĩko wĩũka." 
Job5:22 Ĩvindanĩ ya wanangĩko na ya yũa ũkathekaa, na ndũkakĩa nyamũ nthũku sya kĩthekanĩ." 
Job5:23 Mũũndanĩ waku ndũkathĩnw'a nĩ mavia, nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ iikakũvithũkĩa." 
Job5:24 Ũkekalaa na mũuo ĩeemanĩ yaku; yĩla wasisya malondu maku ũkeethĩaa me ũsũvĩonĩ. 
Job5:25 Ũkeethĩwa na nzyawa mbingĩ, nzyawa syaku ikeethĩwa syĩana nyeki isesinĩ." 
Job5:26 Ta nganũ ĩla ĩendeeaa na kũvika nginya ĩvinda ya ngetha, ũkekala thayũ nginya wĩthĩwe na ũkũũ wa myaka mingĩ." 
Job5:27 Yovu, nĩtũsyaĩtye ũndũ ũũ na nĩ wa w'o, kwoou wĩthukĩĩsye na ũiwĩtĩkĩla ta waku.”" 
Job6:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job6:2 “Kethĩwa mathĩna makwa nĩmathimwa, na kyeva kyakwa kwilĩĩlwa kĩthiminĩ," 
Job6:3 ũito wasyo wĩthĩwa wĩ mwingĩ mbee wa ũito wa kĩthangathĩ kya ũkanga, kwoou ndũkaseng'we nĩ ndeto syakwa ite nzeo." 
Job6:4 Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nũmbathĩte na maangi, na sumu wamo nũvikĩte kĩla vandũ mwĩĩnĩ wakwa. Motĩsyo ma Ngai nĩmanthyũlũlũkĩte." 
Job6:5 Nĩkũlya, ĩng'oi ya kĩthekanĩ nĩyanasya yĩiya nyeki, na ng'ombe nĩyanasya yĩla ĩkũya ũĩthyo?" 
Job6:6 Kĩndũ kĩte mũsamo nĩkĩĩka kĩte mũnyũ, kana mũuu mweũ wa ĩtumbĩ wĩ mũsamo?" 
Job6:7 Ngoo yakwa ndyendaa lĩu ũilyĩ ũu, na lĩu wa mũthemba ũsu nũtumaa nĩwaa.”" 
Job6:8 “Kethĩwa Ngai nũnenga kĩla neetya, kethĩwa nũnzũngĩa mboya syakwa!" 
Job6:9 Kethĩwa Ngai nũkĩta kũmbũaa! Kethĩwa nũtambũũkya kw'oko kwake akandilany'a! 
Job6:10 Ũsu wĩthĩwa ũkiakisyo kwakwa, nĩthĩwa na ũtanu o na nĩ na woo mwingĩ, nĩkwĩthĩwa ndyaaleana na ndeto sya Ũla Mũtheu." 
Job6:11 Ndi na vinya wa kũendeea kwĩkala thayũ. Ndonya kwĩkala thayũ nde na wĩkwatyo ata? 
Job6:12 Vinya wakwa ti ũndũ ũmwe na wa ĩvia, na mwĩĩ wakwa ti wa kyũma kĩtawa mbulonzi." 
Job6:13 Ndi na vinya ndonya kwĩtethya naw'o, nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmbenetwe syĩndũ syonthe." 
Job6:14 “Mũndũ ũkw'ĩte ngoo aĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa na anyanyae meyumĩtye, o na vala nũtonya kwĩthĩwa aekete kũkĩa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe." 
Job6:15 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ anyanyawa, nĩmũngengaa ta tũlũsĩ tũla tũng'alaa kwalea kua." 
Job6:16 Twĩthĩawa na kĩw'ũ kĩtw'ĩkĩte mbalavu ĩũlũ, na ungu tũyĩthĩwa na ĩa," 
Job6:17 ĩndĩ kwavyũva nithelaa, yĩla kwavyũva nithelaa vyũ." 
Job6:18 Aendi ma kyalo mesĩlĩte weũnĩ na nyamũ syoo sya kũkua mĩio nĩmaasya nzĩa, nĩmambataa weũnĩ kũndũ kũte kĩndũ na maikw'ĩĩa kw'o." 
Job6:19 Aendi ma kyalo kuma Tema nĩmamanthaa kĩw'ũ, na atandĩthya kuma Sieva methĩawa na wĩkwatyo." 
Job6:20 Nĩmakusaa ngoo nũndũ meĩ na wĩkwatyo, mavikaa vo na maisonoka." 
Job6:21 Mũtw'ĩkĩte ta tũlũsĩ tũu kũla nĩĩ, nĩmwonaa mathĩna makwa na mũikwatwa nĩ w'ĩa." 
Job6:22 Naamũkũlya mũnenge mũthĩnzĩo, kana mũnenge mũndũ ũngĩ ĩtuvi ya wendeesyo kwondũ wakwa," 
Job6:23 kana mũndangĩĩe kuma kwa mũmaitha wakwa, kana mũmbovosye kuma ũtonyinĩ wa amaitha makwa?" 
Job6:24 “Manyĩsyei, nĩngwĩthukĩĩsya ngilĩtye, ndonyethyei kũmanya mavĩtyo makwa ala nĩkĩte." 
Job6:25 Ndeto syaw'o syĩ vinya mwingĩ, ĩndĩ ũkany'o wenyu wĩndethya ũndũnĩ mwaũ?" 
Job6:26 Nĩmũkũlya, mwĩona ta mũtonya kũlũnga ndeto ila ngũneena? Ndeto sya mũndũ ũte na wĩkwatyo no ta kĩseve!" 
Job6:27 Inyw'ĩ o na nĩmũtonya kũkũna kula kwondũ wa syana ndiwa, na kũthoosya anyanyae menyu!" 
Job6:28 Ĩndĩ yu kwa nzisyei, nyie ndimũkenga." 
Job6:29 Ekai, nĩngũmwĩsũva mũikeke mothũku; ekai yu, nyie nĩ o mũlũngalu." 
Job6:30 Ve ũndũ naneena ũtaĩlĩte? Mwĩsũanĩa kana nditonya kũvathũkany'a ũseo na ũthũku?” 
Job7:1 “Nĩkũlya, nũndũ mũndũ ũtatethasya wĩa wĩ vinya e ĩũlũ wa nthĩ? Nũndũ mĩthenya ya thayũ wake ĩtethĩawa ĩilyĩ ya mũndũ mũandĩke?" 
Job7:2 Ailyĩ ngombo ĩkũmantha muunyĩ, kana ta mũthũkũmi weteelete kũĩvwa." 
Job7:3 Kwoou nĩmbangĩwe myei ya mana, na ngavangĩwa motukũ ma thĩna." 
Job7:4 Yĩla nakoma nĩkũlasya, ‘Mwa nĩkũkakya?’ Ũtukũ nũendeeaa kũasava, na ngiliita nginya kũikya." 
Job7:5 Mwĩĩ wakwa wusũĩte iinyũ na kĩko; kĩkonde kyakwa nĩkĩnyiau, na nĩkĩkwatũkanga kĩkauma mavia." 
Job7:6 Mĩthenya yakwa ĩsembete mbee wa katĩla ka mũndũ ũla ũtumaa, na ĩthelaa vate wĩkwatyo." 
Job7:7 Ame Mwĩai Ngai, lilikana kana thayũ wakwa no mĩthũmũ; ndikona ũndũ mũseo ĩngĩ." 
Job7:8 Metho ma mũndũ ũla ũmbonaa maikambona ĩngĩ, akanzisya, ĩndĩ ngeethĩwa nĩendie." 
Job7:9 O tondũ ĩtu yĩthelekelasya yĩkaa, now'o mũndũ ũla ũkusaa ũtasyokaa ĩngĩ." 
Job7:10 Ndasyokaa nyũmba kwake ĩngĩ, na vala ũnatwĩe nĩwũlaa vyũ." 
Job7:11 “Kwoou ndivindya; nĩngũneena nĩ thĩnanĩ wa thayũ wakwa; nĩngũnyungunyĩsya nũndũ wa thĩna wa thayũ wakwa. 
Job7:12 Nĩkũlya, nyie nĩ ũkanga kana mũkũnga wa ũkanganĩ, nĩ kana ũnenge mũndũ wa kũnzunga?" 
Job7:13 Yĩla naneena nasya, ‘Ũkomo wakwa nũũnthũmũsya, ũkomo wakwa nũũtuma nĩeka kũnyungunyĩsya,’" 
Job7:14 nĩvo ĩndĩ ũndeteae ndoto syĩ w'ĩa, na mawoni ma kũtelemya," 
Job7:15 ũkethĩa nĩona nĩ kavaa nĩnyuve kwitwa nĩkw'e, vandũ va kwĩkala thayũ na mwĩĩ ũũ wakwa wa thĩna." 
Job7:16 Nĩngũmena thayũ wakwa; ndikekala thayũ tene na tene, ekana nakwa, mĩthenya yakwa ndĩ na vata." 
Job7:17 Mũndũ nĩ kyaũ nĩ kana ũmwĩke maũndũ manenevete ũu, na nĩ kana ũsũanĩae mũno ĩũlũ wake?" 
Job7:18 Kĩla kwakya nũmanyaa ũvoo wake, na kũmũtata kĩla ĩvinda." 
Job7:19 Wĩendeea kũnzisya nginya ĩndĩĩ, ũkethĩa o na ndũeka nĩmelye mata?" 
Job7:20 Ethĩwa nĩneeka naĩ, nĩĩthĩwa nakwĩka ata we mũsyaĩĩsya wa andũ? Ũndw'ĩkĩthĩtye ũvano waku wa kũatha nĩkĩ? Nyie ko ndw'ĩkĩte mũio kwaku?" 
Job7:21 Wĩlea kũndekea mavĩtyo makwa nĩkĩ, na kũndekea naĩ syakwa? Nĩkwĩthĩwa oyu mĩtũkĩ nĩngũkw'a; ũkamantha, ĩndĩ ndikethĩwa thayũ ĩngĩ!”" 
Job8:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma nthĩ ya Sui wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job8:2 “Wĩendeea kũneena ndeto sya mũthemba ũsu nginya ĩndĩĩ? Ndeto syaku nĩ ta kĩseve kĩ na vinya. 
Job8:3 Nĩkũlya, Ngai nĩwelelũkasya ũsili wa katĩ? Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nũalyũlaa ũla wa w'o?" 
Job8:4 Yĩla syana syaku syamũvĩtĩisye Ngai, nĩwaikanisye nũndũ wa naĩ yasyo." 
Job8:5 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nũũmũmantha Ngai, na kwĩsũva Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe," 
Job8:6 ethĩwa wĩ mũtheu na wĩ mũlũngalu, kwa w'o Ngai akooka ũkũtetheesya, akakũnenga wĩkalo ũla waĩlĩte." 
Job8:7 Kĩla waĩ nakyo mbeenĩ kyaĩ kĩnini kĩisianĩw'a na ũthwii ũla wĩĩthĩwa naw'o, ũkaendeea nesa mũno mĩthenyanĩ yaku ĩla yũkĩte." 
Job8:8 “Kũlya nzyawa sya ĩvinda ya tene; na ũimanya kĩla aaũmae moo meesĩ," 
Job8:9 nĩkwĩthĩwa ithyĩ tũnasyaiwe mĩtũkĩ, na tũyĩsĩ kĩndũ, na mĩthenya yaitũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ ĩthelaa ta kyuu." 
Job8:10 Ĩndĩ eka aaũmau ala oĩ makũmanyĩsye; ĩthukĩĩsye ũndũ meũkwĩa. 
Job8:11 “Makangaa nĩmatonya kũmea vandũ vate kĩsoo? Makaangaa nĩmatonya kwĩanĩa nesa vandũ vate kĩw'ũ? 
Job8:12 Maendee kwĩana matanamba kũtemwa, nĩmomaa mĩtũkĩ o na mbee wa nyeki." 
Job8:13 Mũminũkĩlyo wa ala molawa nĩ Ngai ũilyĩ ũu; wĩkwatyo wa ala matamwĩsĩ Ngai waa ũu. 
Job8:14 Kĩla maĩkĩĩaa nĩ kĩndũ kĩtonya kũkw'a; kĩla mekwatasya nĩ ũlũalũĩ. 
Job8:15 Nĩmeyaĩĩasya ũlũalũĩnĩ ũsu, ĩndĩ ũyanangĩka, nĩmawĩkwatĩlaa, ĩndĩ ũitilĩkanga." 
Job8:16 “Ala athũku mailyĩ ta mũtĩ wĩ syũanĩ mũnyithye nesa, nthongoo syaw'o imeete kĩla vandũ mũũndanĩ;" 
Job8:17 wovanasya mbumbu ya mavia na mĩi yaw'o, na ĩkelingĩla kĩla ĩvianĩ." 
Job8:18 Ĩndĩ yĩla nthongoo isu syakũwa, vala inameete nĩvaleaa kana syaĩ vo na kwasya, ‘Ndyaamwona.’" 
Job8:19 Kwa w'o ũsu nĩw'o mũminũkĩlyo wa ũtanu wa mũndũ mũthũku, andũ angĩ nĩmokaa na kwosa mwanya wake." 
Job8:20 “Kwa w'o Ngai ndaleaa mũndũ mũlũngalu, kana akekĩa moko ma eki ma naĩ vinya." 
Job8:21 Ũu wĩ o vo akatuma ũtheka mũno, na ũineena na wasya mũnene wa ũtanu." 
Job8:22 Amaitha maku makakwatwa nĩ nthoni, na mĩsyĩ ya ala athũku ĩkaomboka vyũ.”" 
Job9:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job9:2 “Nĩnĩsĩ nesa kana ũu nĩ wa w'o, ĩndĩ mũndũ atonya ata kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu methonĩ ma Ngai?" 
Job9:3 Ethĩwa mũndũ nũkwenda kũkananĩa nake, katĩ wa makũlyo ngili mũndũ ndatonya kũmũsũngĩa o na yĩmwe." 
Job9:4 Ngai nĩ mũĩ mũno na e ũtonyi mwingĩ; ve mũndũ ũtonya kũkita nake akamũsinda? 
Job9:5 Nũthamasya iĩma itesĩ kana nũkwĩka ũu, na aisyananga nũndũ wa ũthatu wake." 
Job9:6 Ngai nũthingithasya nthĩ kuma wambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wayo, na kũtuma ituĩ syayo ithingitha." 
Job9:7 Nĩwĩyĩaĩaa syũa yĩkalea kuma, nũvw'ĩkĩĩaa ndata iikaumye kyeni." 
Job9:8 We e weka nĩwe watambũũkisye matu, na esĩla ĩũlũ wa itulumo sya ũkanga." 
Job9:9 Nĩwe waseũvisye ndata ila syĩtawa: Ayisi, Olioni, Kĩkundi kya Ndata Mbingĩ, na ndata sya ngalĩko ya ĩtheo." 
Job9:10 Nĩwĩkaa syama na maũndũ matamanyĩka, syama itatalĩka." 
Job9:11 Yĩla Ngai wambĩtũka, ndimwonaa, yĩla waendeea kũthi, ndimũmanyaa." 
Job9:12 Nĩwosaa kĩla ũkwenda na vai mũndũ ũtonya kũmũsiĩĩa; vai mũndũ ũmũkũlasya, ‘Wĩĩkany'a ata?’”" 
Job9:13 Ngai ndakasiĩĩa ũthatu wake; o na atetheesya ma Laavi nĩmakumanaa mbee wake. 
Job9:14 Yu ĩndĩ ndonya ata kũkananĩa nake? Ndonya ata kũmantha ndeto sya kũkananĩa nake? 
Job9:15 O na kau ndi na ĩvĩtyo, nditonya kũmũsũngĩa, no nginya nĩsũvane ngwate tei kuma kwa mũsili wakwa." 
Job9:16 O na ethĩwa nĩnamwĩtie na eetĩka, ndiũsũanĩa kana nũtonya kũmbĩthukĩĩsya." 
Job9:17 Nũkũmbananga na kĩuutani, na ayongeleela itau syakwa vate kitumi." 
Job9:18 Ndakandeka nĩveve, atumĩte nĩthĩwa nĩ mũthatu." 
Job9:19 Ethĩwa nĩ kũweta vinya, we e vinya mwingĩ! Ethĩwa nĩ kwondũ wa ũsili wa katĩ, nũũ ũtonya kũmwĩta akathi kĩsilĩlonĩ?" 
Job9:20 O na kau nĩ mũlũngalu, ndeto syakwa nĩũnzilĩla; o na ethĩwa ndiwetwa ũndũ ũthũku, we nũkũndĩkĩĩthya kana nyie nĩ mũvĩtany'a." 
Job9:21 O na kau nditũlwa mũtĩ, ndyĩsiasya nyie mwene; nĩmbũthasya mwĩĩ wakwa." 
Job9:22 Maũndũ onthe no ũndũ ũmwe; kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi ngwasya, Nĩwanangaa ala alũngalu na ala avuku." 
Job9:23 Yĩla mathĩna matuma kĩkw'ũ kyũka kwa kĩthũlũmũko, nũthekeeaa kũsindwa kwa ala alũngalu." 
Job9:24 Yĩla nthĩ yeethĩwa yĩ ũtonyinĩ wa andũ athũku, nũtumaa asili maeka kwona nthĩ! Ethĩwa ti we wĩkaa ũu, nũũ ĩndĩ?" 
Job9:25 Mĩthenya yakwa ĩendete mĩtũkĩ mbee wa mũndũ asembete; nĩvĩtaa mĩtũkĩ na ndĩthĩawa na ũtanu. 
Job9:26 Ĩvĩtĩte mĩtũkĩ ta ĩsiwa yĩla yĩsembaa vyũ; yĩkalaatĩte ta ndiũ ĩtheete ĩkakwate kĩndũ. 
Job9:27 Ethĩwa nĩnaneena na kwasya, Nĩngũlwa nĩ kũnyungunyĩsya kwakwa, nĩngũeka kũthata na ngĩtana," 
Job9:28 nĩendeeaa kũkĩa mathĩna makwa onthe, nũndũ nĩnĩsĩ kana Ngai ndakalea kũndalĩla ĩvĩtyo." 
Job9:29 Nũndũ nĩnĩminĩte kwĩthĩwa nĩ na ĩvĩtyo, nĩĩthĩny'a mana nĩkĩ?" 
Job9:30 O na ngathamba na savunĩ, na kũthesya moko makwa na ĩati," 
Job9:31 ũu wĩ o vo, ũkandikya ĩimanĩ yĩ mũtondo, na ngũa syakwa mwene ikandea." 
Job9:32 Nũndũ Ngai ti mũndũ takwa ũkethĩa nĩndonya kũmũsũngĩa, kana tũkathi kũsila ĩkoani nake." 
Job9:33 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ wa kũlikĩlĩĩla katĩ waitũ, vai mũndũ wa kũnzilany'a na Ngai." 
Job9:34 Ngai nĩaeke kũngany'a, na aieka kũndelemya!" 
Job9:35 Nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩneena ndeũmũkĩa, nĩkwĩthĩwa thayũ wakwa ndũilyĩ ũu." 
Job10:1 “Nĩnĩmenete thayũ wakwa; nĩngũnyungunyĩsya vate kĩsiĩĩi. Nĩneena nũndũ wa woo wa thayũ wakwa. 
Job10:2 We Ngai ndũkandalĩle ĩvĩtyo, ndavye mavĩtyo makwa nĩ maũ." 
Job10:3 Nĩkũlya, nĩwaĩlu kwaku kũnthĩny'a, kũvũthya wĩa ũla watethisye, na kũtanĩthw'a nĩ mĩvango ya andũ athũkũ?" 
Job10:4 Nĩkũlya, nũndũ metho maku mailyĩ o ta ma andũ, wonaa o ũndũ andũ monaa?" 
Job10:5 Nĩkũlya, nũndũ mĩthenya ya thayũ waku ĩilyĩ mĩthenya ya mũndũ, na myaka yaku ta ya mũndũ," 
Job10:6 nĩ kana ũmanthe mavĩtyo makwa, na kũmantha naĩ yakwa?" 
Job10:7 Nowĩsĩ kana ndi na ĩvĩtyo, na vai mũndũ ũtonya kũndangĩĩa kuma ũtonyinĩ waku." 
Job10:8 Moko maku nĩmangwatanisye na mambũmba, nĩkũlya, yu wĩenda kũmbĩndũkĩa na kũmina?" 
Job10:9 Lilikana kana wambũmbie na yũmba; nĩkũlya, yu nũkũalyũka na kũndw'ĩkĩthya kĩtoo ĩngĩ?" 
Job10:10 Ndwambonoisye ta kĩw'ũ ĩvunĩ ya inyia wakwa, na watuma mwĩĩ wakwa wambĩĩa kwĩanĩa vo?" 
Job10:11 Nĩwoombie mwĩĩ wakwa kwa kũkwatany'a mavĩndĩ na malangũ, na wavw'ĩka mavĩndĩ makwa na nyama na kĩkonde." 
Job10:12 Nũnengete thayũ na ũkambenda, na ũsũvĩo waku nũtumĩte nĩendeea kwĩthĩwa nĩ thayũ." 
Job10:13 Ĩndĩ yu nĩnamanya kana ĩvinda yonthe, ũneethĩawa ũvangĩte kũmbĩka naĩ; nĩnĩsĩ kana asu nĩmo manaĩ mosũanĩo maku." 
Job10:14 Ũnasyaĩĩsye wone kana nĩngwĩka naĩ, nĩ kana ũlee kũndekea." 
Job10:15 Yĩla neeka naĩ, nĩthĩawa thĩnanĩ, ĩndĩ neeka ũla waĩlu, vai ũseo nonaa. Nusũĩtwe nĩ thĩna na nthoni." 
Job10:16 Ethĩwa nĩnĩendee nesa, ũnzyĩmaa ta mũnyambũ; nĩwĩkaa syama nĩ kana ũnthĩny'e." 
Job10:17 Kĩla ĩvinda nũndeteae ngũsĩ imbũkite, ũthatu waku kũla nĩĩ nũendeeaa kwingĩva; kĩla ĩvinda nũndeteae amaitha eũ mambũkite." 
Job10:18 “Wambumisye ĩvunĩ ya inyia wakwa nĩkĩ? Kava kethĩwa nakwie mũndũ o na wĩva atanambona. 
Job10:19 Kava kethĩwa nasyawa nĩnakwie na ngĩthikwa mĩtũkĩ, ũsu wĩthĩwa wĩ ũndũ ũseo kwĩ kwĩkala thayũ." 
Job10:20 Nĩkũlya, thayũ wakwa yu ndũkilĩlye kũthela? Ekana nakwa nĩ kana nĩthĩwe na kavinda ka kũtana vanini." 
Job10:21 Ndanamba kũthi kũndũ ndakasyoka, nthĩ ya kĩmako na kĩvindu kĩkamu," 
Job10:22 nthĩ yĩ kĩvindu kĩkamu na yĩ kĩthokoo, kũla kyeni kĩilyĩ kĩvindu.”" 
Job11:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzovali kuma nthĩ ya Naamathi wasũngĩie akũlya atĩĩ," 
Job11:2 “Ndeto isu syonthe niũlea kũsũngĩwa? Mũndũ ũyũ ũneenete ndeto singĩvĩte ũu atonya ata kũtalĩlwa ũlũngalu? 
Job11:3 Wĩsũanĩa ũneeni waku wa mana nũũtuma andũ makilya? Mũndũ ũla ũvũthasya akalea kũkanw'a? 
Job11:4 Ũneenaa ũkasya, ‘Kĩla ngũneena nĩ kyaw'o, na ndi na ĩvĩtyo mbee wa Ngai.’" 
Job11:5 Nenda kethĩwa Ngai nũneena naku, akaneena naku akũsũngĩe." 
Job11:6 Ngai no akũtavye syĩmbithĩ sya ũĩ, nĩkwĩthĩwa e ũĩ mwingĩ. Manya kana Ngai ndaatala mavĩtyo maku onthe." 
Job11:7 “Kwa w'o we nũtonya kũmanya syĩmbithĩ sya Ngai? We nũtonya kũmanya ũndũ ũnene wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe wĩana? 
Job11:8 Wĩ ĩũlũ mbee wa matu. We ũtonya kwĩka ata! Nĩ mũliku mbee wa ũliku wa vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa. We ũtonya kũmanya kyaũ? 
Job11:9 Kĩthimo kyaw'o nĩ kĩasa mbee wa nthĩ, nĩkĩthanthau mbee wa ũkanga." 
Job11:10 “Ethĩwa Ngai akakwata mũndũ amwove yela na kũmũtwaa kĩsilĩlonĩ, nũũ ũtonya kũmũsiĩĩa?" 
Job11:11 Kwa w'o Ngai nũmanyaa andũ ala me ũvũngũ, na yĩla woona ũndũ ũthũku ndolawa nĩ andũ ala mawĩka." 
Job11:12 Mũndũ mũtumanu ndatonya kũĩva, o tondũ ĩng'oi ya kĩthekanĩ yĩtasyaawa yĩ ĩvundĩsye." 
Job11:13 “Ĩndĩ wamũnenga Ngai ngoo yaku, na kũmũtambũũkĩsya moko maku," 
Job11:14 ethĩwa ũkaeka kwĩka naĩ, na kũlea ũthũku ũyĩthĩwa mũsyĩ kwaku," 
Job11:15 ũkeethĩwa ũte na nthoni; ũkaũngama na ũlũmu ũte na w'ĩa. 
Job11:16 Ũkoolwa nĩ mathĩna maku; ũkamalilikanaa o ta kĩw'ũ kyavĩtie. 
Job11:17 Thayũ waku ũkatisatisaa mbee wa syũa saa sita, kĩvindu kya thayũ waku kĩkatw'ĩka kyeni kya kwakya." 
Job11:18 Ũkeethĩawa na ũkũmbaũ nũndũ ve wĩkwatyo; Ngai akakũsũvĩa na ũkũnenga ũthũmũo. 
Job11:19 Ũkakomaa na vai mũndũ ũkakũtelemya; andũ aingĩ makavoyaa ũtethyo kwaku. 
Job11:20 Ĩndĩ andũ athũku makaeka kwona; makaaĩwa nĩ nzĩa ya kũkĩa nayo. Wĩkwatyo woo wa mũthya nĩ kũkw'a.” 
Job12:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job12:2 “Vate nzika ninyw'ĩ wasya wa andũ, ũĩ ũkakw'a vamwe nenyu." 
Job12:3 Ĩndĩ o nakwa nĩ na ũĩ wĩanene na ũla mwĩ naw'o; nyie ndi mũnini kĩlĩkonĩ kwĩ inyw'ĩ ũndũnĩ o na wĩva. Ũla ũtesĩ maũndũ asu onthe mwaneena nũũ? 
Job12:4 Ndw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kya kũthekeewa nĩ anyanyawa; nyie ũla navoyaa Ngai akanzũngĩa, o na vala nĩ mũlũngalu na nditũlwa mũtĩ nĩ mũndũ; ndw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kya kũthekeewa." 
Job12:5 Andũ ala mate na mathĩna, nĩmavũthĩĩasya maũndũ mathũku ala mekĩkaa; maũndũ ta ala makwataa mũndũ ũla ũtiũũkaa." 
Job12:6 Ĩndĩ ing'ei na ala matamwĩsĩ Ngai mekalaa na mũuo, o na vala vinya woo nĩw'o ngai yoo." 
Job12:7 “Ĩndĩ we kũlya nyamũ, nasyo niũkũmanyĩsya; kũlya nyũnyi sya yayaya, nasyo niũkũtavya;" 
Job12:8 kũlya nthĩ, nayo nĩkũũmanyĩsya, kana ũkũlye makũyũ ma ũkanganĩ nĩ kana makũtavye." 
Job12:9 Nĩ kĩva katĩ wa syĩndũ isu kĩla kĩtesĩ, kana nĩ kw'oko kwa Mwĩai Ngai kwĩkĩte ũu?" 
Job12:10 Thayũ wa syũmbe syonthe, na mĩthũmũ ya andũ onthe yĩ ũtonyinĩ wake." 
Job12:11 Nĩkũlya, kũtũ nĩkũvathũkanasya ndeto, o ũndũ ũĩmĩ ũsamaa lĩu?" 
Job12:12 Ũĩ wĩ andũnĩ ala akũũ, na ũmanyi wĩ andũnĩ ala mekalĩte mĩthenya mingĩ." 
Job12:13 Ũĩ na ũtonyi nĩ sya Ngai; ũtao na ũmanyi nĩ syake. 
Job12:14 Ngai aomboa vai ũtonya kwaka; oova mũndũ vai ũtonya kũmũthasya. 
Job12:15 Asiĩĩa mbua, nĩkũkaa mũnyao; Aeka kue, nthĩ nĩyusũaa kĩw'ũ." 
Job12:16 “Vinya na ũsindi nĩ syake; ũla ũkengawa na ũla ũkenganaa nĩ make. 
Job12:17 Nũekaa ala manenganae ũtao makathi mate ngũa; na kũtuma atongoi meka ta andũ atumanu. 
Job12:18 Nũvenaa asumbĩ ũsumbĩ woo, na aimatw'ĩkĩthya ovwa." 
Job12:19 Nũekaa athembi makathi mate ngũa, na nũsindaa ala me na vinya." 
Job12:20 Nũvindĩthasya atai ala aĩkĩĩe, na kũveta ũĩ wa atumĩa." 
Job12:21 Nĩwĩkĩĩthasya nthoni ala me ũtonyi, na ala me vinya nũmavenaa mĩio ya kaũ." 
Job12:22 Nũvuanasya maũndũ maliku makoka kyeninĩ, na nũtumaa kĩvindu kĩkamu kĩtw'ĩka kyeni." 
Job12:23 Nũtumaa mbaĩ ineneva na nũsyanangaa; nũtumaa mbaĩ syĩthĩwa na vinya na nĩwivalaanasya. 
Job12:24 Nũvetaa ũmanyi atongoinĩ ma andũ ma nthĩ; na nũtumaa maenda mangangĩte weũnĩ ũte nzĩa. 
Job12:25 Nũtumaa maenda mavavatĩte kĩvindunĩ ta ilalinda; na nũtumaa maenda malũĩte ta athengi.” 
Job13:1 “Metho makwa nĩmonete maũndũ asu onthe; matũ makwa nĩmew'ĩte na nĩnĩmanyĩte maũndũ asu. 
Job13:2 Maũndũ ala mwĩsĩ o nakwa nĩnĩmesĩ; nyie ndi mũnini kĩlĩkonĩ kwĩ inyw'ĩ. 
Job13:3 Ĩndĩ nyie nĩenda kũneena na Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe; nĩenda kwĩtetea vala ve Ngai. 
Job13:4 Ĩndĩ inyw'ĩ mwĩvw'ĩka ũw'o mũitũmĩa ũvũngũ; inyw'onthe mwĩ ndakĩtalĩ sya mana. 
Job13:5 Mwa kethĩwa no mũvindya, kũvindya kwenyu kwĩthĩwa ũĩ wenyu." 
Job13:6 “Yu ĩthukĩĩsyei mosũanĩo makwa; ĩthukĩĩsyei kwĩsũvana kwakwa. 
Job13:7 Mwĩsũanĩa mwĩthũkũma Ngai yĩla mũũneena ũvũngũ? Mwĩsũanĩa kana yĩla mũũkengana mwĩkengana kwondũ wa Ngai? 
Job13:8 Mwĩenda kwonany'a wendeesyo vala ve Ngai? Mũkatetea Ngai kĩsilĩlonĩ? 
Job13:9 Nĩkũlya, Ngai akamũsisya nesa ethĩwa mwĩ aseo? Inyw'ĩ nĩmũtonya kũkenga Ngai ũndũ mũtonya kũkenga andũ?" 
Job13:10 Vate nzika Ngai akamũkany'a inyw'ĩ, ethĩwa mwĩonany'a wendeesyo kwa kĩmbithĩ." 
Job13:11 Ũnene wake ndũtonya kũmũtelemya? Inyw'ĩ mũikwatawa nĩ w'ĩa nũndũ wake? 
Job13:12 Nthimo syenyu nĩ sya mana o ta mũu; kwĩtetea kyenyu kũmonyokaa ta ndaka. 
Job13:13 Vindyai na mũieka nĩneene, o na ethĩwa nĩkwatwa nĩ ũndũ mwaũ." 
Job13:14 “Nyie nĩnĩyũmbanĩtye kũlikya thayũ wakwa mũisyonĩ. 
Job13:15 Ngai nĩambũae, nyie ndi na wĩkwatyo; ĩndĩ no nginya nĩtetee mwĩkalo wakwa nĩ mbee wake." 
Job13:16 No vatonyeka ũkethĩa ũkũmbaũ wakwa ũkandangĩĩa, nũndũ vai mũndũ mũthũku ũtata kũũngama mbee wa Ngai." 
Job13:17 Ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto syakwa nesa; matũ menyu nĩmew'e ũndũ ngwasya. 
Job13:18 Nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩnĩyũmbanĩsye ĩkoani yakwa nesa, nĩnĩsĩ nesa kana ngatalĩlwa ũlũngalu." 
Job13:19 “Ve mũndũ ũtonya kũneenany'a nakwa ũndũnĩ o na wĩva? Kethĩwa nĩmwonany'a kana nĩ na mavĩtyo, nyie no kũvindya na ngĩkw'a." 
Job13:20 Ame Ngai, nenga o maũndũ aa elĩ, na ndiĩvitha kuma vala ũĩ:" 
Job13:21 Eka kũngany'a, na eka kũndelemya na maũndũ maku mew'ĩthasya w'ĩa." 
Job13:22 We Ngai amba kũneena, nakwa ngĩũsũngĩa, kana ũeke nambe kũneena, naku ũinzũngĩa." 
Job13:23 Nyie nĩkĩte mavĩtyo na naĩ syĩana ata? Mbony'e ĩvĩtyo na naĩ yakwa. 
Job13:24 “Ũmbĩvithaa nĩkĩ? Wonaa ta nĩ mũmaitha waku nĩkĩ? 
Job13:25 We nũũndelemya o na kau nĩilyĩ ta ĩtũ yĩũlũkĩtw'e nĩ kĩseve, nũũnzembany'a o na kau nĩilyĩ mavuti momũ?" 
Job13:26 We Ngai ũnzikatĩte na mavĩtyo me woo; nũtumĩte nĩkua naĩ ila neekie nĩ wa mũika. 
Job13:27 Nũmbovete maũũ na mĩtĩ ya kwova andũ; nũsyaĩĩasya vyũ nzĩa syonthe ila nĩendelaa, kwa kwĩkĩa movano ungu wa nyaĩĩ syakwa." 
Job13:28 Kwondũ wa ũu nyie nĩthelaa ta mũtĩ mwou, ta ngũa ĩĩtwe nĩ mũthwa.”" 
Job14:1 “Mũndũ ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka, matukũ make nĩ manini na mausũĩtwe nĩ thĩna." 
Job14:2 Nĩwĩanaa ta ĩlaa na ayũma; o ta kyuu kĩla kĩvĩtaa, we ndekalaa." 
Job14:3 Ame Ngai, nĩkĩ ũsiasya mũndũ ta ũsu, na ũyambĩĩa kũsila nake?" 
Job14:4 Nũũ ũla ũtonya kumya kĩndũ kĩtheu kuma kĩndũnĩ kĩte kĩtheu? Vai mũndũ ũtonya! 
Job14:5 Mĩthenya ya mũndũ nĩ mĩtale; we Ngai nũminĩte kũvanga ũtalo wa myei yake, naku nũmwĩkĩĩe mĩvaka ũtatonya kũkĩla." 
Job14:6 Kwondũ wa ũu sisya ũtee na ũiekana nake, nĩ kana atanĩe mĩthenya yake o ta mũndũ mũandĩke." 
Job14:7 Ve wĩkwatyo kwa mũtĩ ũla ũminĩte kũtemwa; mũtĩ ũsu nũtonya kwĩthĩwa thayũ ĩngĩ na kũthongooa. 
Job14:8 O na vala mĩi ya mũtĩ ũsu nĩtonya kũkũa, na kĩthukĩ kyaw'o kĩyũmĩa mũthanganĩ," 
Job14:9 mũtĩ ũsu weew'a mũuke wa kĩw'ũ nũthongooaa, nĩwumasya nthongoo ta mũtĩ mwĩũ." 
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ Mũndũ nũkusaa, na ũsu nĩw'o mũthya wake; mũndũ nũvevaa ĩvinda ya mũthya, na ayĩthĩwa atevo ĩngĩ." 
Job14:11 “O ũndũ kĩw'ũ kĩng'alaa ũkanganĩ, kana o ũndũ kĩw'ũ kĩolekaa ũsĩnĩ na ũsĩ ũing'ala," 
Job14:12 now'o andũ makomaa nthĩ na mailea kũkĩla ĩngĩ; andũ maikokĩla nginya yĩla matu makathela, kana kũamũkw'a kuma toonĩ woo." 
Job14:13 “Mwa kavaa kethĩwa nũmbitha mbũanĩ, na ũimbw'ĩkĩĩa nginya ũthatu waku ũthele! Mwa kethĩwa no ũmbangĩe ĩvinda na kũndilikana!" 
Job14:14 Nĩkũlya, andũ mamina kũkw'a nĩmatonya kwĩthĩwa thayũ ĩngĩ? Kethĩwa ũu nĩwĩthĩawa, mĩthenya yonthe ya thĩna wakwa, nĩkala neteelete na wĩkwatyo ĩvinda yĩla ngathaw'a." 
Job14:15 Nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩthĩwa ũtonya kwĩtana, nakwa ngĩkwĩtĩka; nĩvo ũtonya kwĩthĩwa na mea na kyũmbe kĩla woombie na moko maku." 
Job14:16 Wĩthĩwa ũisyaĩĩsya kĩla ĩtambya ndambasya, ĩndĩ ndwĩthĩwa ũiatĩĩa naĩ yakwa." 
Job14:17 Mavĩtyo makwa methĩwa mavingĩwa mũvukonĩ; naku wĩthĩwa ũvw'ĩka ũthũku wakwa. 
Job14:18 “Ĩndĩ o tondũ iĩma iombokaa na kũvalũka, na mavia manene maikũka kuma vala mekalaa," 
Job14:19 na o tondũ kĩw'ũ kĩĩsaa mavia, na mbua mbingĩ ĩikua mũthanga, ũu now'o naku wanangaa wĩkwatyo wa mũndũ." 
Job14:20 Ngai nũvalũkasya mũndũ, nake mũndũ ũsu ayaa tene na tene; nũalyũlaa ũthyũ wa mũndũ na ũimwĩkya ĩtheka." 
Job14:21 Syana syake syatw'ĩka andũ me ndaĩa, mũndũ ndamanyaa; syavenwa ndaĩa, mũndũ ndonaa ũu." 
Job14:22 Mũndũ ew'aa kyalya kya mwĩĩ wake mwene, na eyĩw'ĩaa kyeva we mwene.”" 
Job15:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi, kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani wasũngĩie kwa kũkũlya atĩĩ," 
Job15:2 “Mũndũ mũĩ nũsũngĩaa na ndeto sya mana, kana kusũwa nĩ ndeto ite vata?" 
Job15:3 Mũndũ mũĩ nĩwĩteteaa na ndeto itaĩlĩte, kana kwĩtetea na ũneeni ũtauna?" 
Job15:4 Ĩndĩ we Yovu nũũtuma andũ methĩwa mate na kĩkĩo kya Ngai; na nũũtuma andũ maeka kwĩyumya kũla kwĩ Ngai. 
Job15:5 Ũneeni waku nĩw'o ũkwonany'a ũthũku waku, naku ũnyuvaa kũneena ta akengani." 
Job15:6 Ndeto syaku mwene nĩsyo iũkũsilĩla ti inyie, ũneeni waku nĩw'o ũũkũsilĩla." 
Job15:7 “Wĩsũanĩa nue mũndũ wa mbee kũsyawa? Wasyaiwe iĩma itanamba kwĩthĩwa vo? 
Job15:8 We waĩ nzamanĩ ya Ngai? Kana nue mũĩ wĩ weka? 
Job15:9 Wĩsĩ ũndũ mwaũ ũla ithyĩ tũtesĩ? Ũeleawa nĩ ũndũ mwaũ ũla ithyĩ tũtaeleawa? 
Job15:10 Katĩ waitũ ve atumĩa akũũ oĩ, me na ũkũũ mbee wa ĩthe waku." 
Job15:11 Mokiakisyo ala Ngai ũkũnengae ko manini mũno? Kana ndeto yake ya ũuu kwaku ti kĩndũ? 
Job15:12 Ngoo yaku yĩkũtongoesya kũthata nĩkĩ, na wĩvenaveny'a na ngathĩĩo nĩkĩ," 
Job15:13 nginya ũkathatĩa Ngai, na kũneena ndeto ithũkĩte ta isu?" 
Job15:14 Ve mũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũtheu? Ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka nũtonya kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu? 
Job15:15 Ethĩwa Ngai ndaĩkĩĩaa o na alaĩka make, na ethĩwa kwake o na matu ti matheu," 
Job15:16 nĩ vinya mũno kũĩkĩĩa mũndũ, ũla nĩ mũvuku na wĩkaa maũndũ mathũku; ũla wĩ na waũni wa kwĩka mothũku ta waũni wa kĩw'ũ." 
Job15:17 “Mbĩthukĩĩsye yu, nakwa nĩngũkwony'a, nĩngũũtavya maũndũ ala nonete," 
Job15:18 maũndũ ala mamanyĩĩtw'e nĩ andũ oĩ, maũndũ ala aaũmae moo mataavitha," 
Job15:19 aaũmae ala no mo me oka, Ngai wanengie nthĩ ĩsu, yĩla vataĩ mũeni wavĩtĩlaa katĩ woo." 
Job15:20 Mũndũ mũthũku athĩnaa mĩthenya yonthe ya thayũ wake, mũndũ ũte tei athĩnaa myaka yonthe ĩla ũnengetwe." 
Job15:21 Mawasya ma kũtelemya mausũaa matũnĩ make, yĩla ũkwona ta ũendee nesa, nĩw'o ing'ei imũvithũkĩaa." 
Job15:22 Mũndũ mũthũku ndethĩawa na wĩkwatyo wa kuma kĩvindunĩ; athĩĩwe kũawa na ũvyũ. 
Job15:23 Nĩwangangaa aimantha lĩu aikũlya, ‘Lĩu ũĩva?’ Mũndũ ũsu nĩwĩsĩ kana mũthenya wa kĩvindu nĩ mũthengeeu." 
Job15:24 Thĩna na woo, nimũtelemasya, imũsindaa o tondũ mũsumbĩ wĩyũmbanĩtye kũthi kaũnĩ ũsindaa." 
Job15:25 Maũndũ asu mekĩkaa nũndũ mũndũ ũsu nũkũnzĩe Ngai ngundi; nĩwĩkathĩĩe vala ve Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe. 
Job15:26 Nũminĩte kũsemba na mĩng'athĩlĩĩlyo avithũkĩe Ngai, nũminĩte kũsemba e na ngao nũmu." 
Job15:27 O na vala ũthyũ wake nĩ mũnou mũno, na kĩnyunyu kyake kyusĩe mauta," 
Job15:28 akatũa ndũanĩ ila syatiiwe syĩ nthei, nyũmbanĩ ila itekalawa nĩ mũndũ, nyũmba ila syavangiwe syĩthĩwe ivumbu sya myako myanangĩku." 
Job15:29 Mũndũ ũsu ndakethĩwa e mũthwii o na ĩndĩĩ, na syĩndũ syake iikekala ĩũlũ wa nthĩ, o na ũthwii wake ndũkanyaĩĩka ĩũlũ wa nthĩ." 
Job15:30 Vate ndĩi ndakalea kũkw'a. Akeethĩwa ailyĩ mũtĩ ũla nthongoo syaw'o ivĩvĩtw'e nĩ mwaki, na mĩthũmũ ya Ngai ĩkamũũlũkya athi vaasa." 
Job15:31 Nĩ aeke kwĩkenga kwa kwĩkwatya syĩndũ ite vata, nũndũ vai kĩndũ ũkakwata ta ĩtuvi yake." 
Job15:32 Ailyĩ ta ũvonge ũla ũvovaa ĩvinda yaw'o yĩtanavika, na ndwĩsaa kũthongooa ĩngĩ." 
Job15:33 Akeethĩwa ailyĩ ta mũsavivũ, ũla wĩtĩkasya nzavivũ mbĩthĩ, ta mũthata ũla wĩtĩkasya malaa maw'o." 
Job15:34 Onthe ala matakĩaa Ngai maikethĩwa na syana, na mwaki ũkaananga mĩsyĩ ya andũ ala mosaa ĩtuvi ya wendeesyo." 
Job15:35 Nĩmaitavaa ũseleke na maisyaa ũthũku, na ngoo syoo iseũvasya ũkengani.”" 
Job16:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job16:2 “Nĩnĩw'ĩte maũndũ maingĩ ta asu; inyw'onthe mwĩ akiakisya ma kũthĩny'a! 
Job16:3 Ũneeni wenyu wa mana ũkathela ĩndĩĩ? Kana nĩ kyaũ kĩla kĩũtuma mwenda kũendeea kũneena? 
Job16:4 Kethĩwa inyw'ĩ nĩmũtw'ĩka nyie, nakwa ngĩtw'ĩka inyw'ĩ, nĩthĩwa ngĩneena o tenyu; nĩthĩwa nĩtonya kũseũvya ndeto sya kũmũneenea, na kũmũthingithĩsya mũtwe wakwa." 
Job16:5 Nĩthĩwa nĩmwĩkĩa vinya na ũtao wakwa, na ũkiakisyo wakwa wĩthĩwa ũmũvetea kyalya kyenyu." 
Job16:6 Ĩndĩ o na naneena kyalya kyakwa kĩiũthela, na nalea kũneena kyalya kyakwa kĩikwĩveta." 
Job16:7 Kwa w'o Ngai nũminĩte vinya wakwa, na akananga mũsyĩ wakwa w'onthe." 
Job16:8 Nũmbovete ngalũma, na ũsu ũkatw'ĩka ũkũsĩ, ndialĩte kĩkonde na mavĩndĩ, na andũ matw'ĩte ũsu ta w'o ũkũsĩ wa ĩvĩtyo yakwa." 
Job16:9 Ngai nũndembũangĩte e na woo na akamena; ambevetanĩsye maeo make nĩ kĩmena; mũmaitha wakwa nũngũnũĩaa metho make e na woo. 
Job16:10 Andũ nĩmanthaũkĩaa na kũnthekeea, nĩmanthyũlũlũkĩte na mengũna matau me na kĩvũthya." 
Job16:11 Ngai nũnenganĩte mokonĩ ma andũ me ngũlũ, na nũmbĩkĩtye mokonĩ ma andũ athũku." 
Job16:12 Nĩnekalaa na mũuo, ĩndĩ we andũlanga; nũngwatĩte ngingo na kũmbatũanga ilungu. Nũndw'ĩkĩthĩtye ũvano wake wa kũatha;" 
Job16:13 nũngathĩte na maangi kuma ngalĩko syonthe, nũmbũthũĩte mbio ate na tei, nĩwĩtĩte nyongo yakwa nthĩ." 
Job16:14 Nũnũmĩĩtye mavinda maingĩ, na anzembeaa ta mũsikalĩ wa kaũ." 
Job16:15 Nĩnĩkĩĩte ngũa ngaamu sya makunia, na ngekala nthĩ mũthanganĩ nĩ mũsinde." 
Job16:16 Ũthyũ wakwa nũtukĩte nũndũ wa kũĩa, na metho makwa nĩ maimbu na nĩmatune." 
Job16:17 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo, ndyaathĩny'a mũndũ na moko makwa, na mboya syakwa vala ve Ngai nĩ ntheu." 
Job16:18 Nĩilyĩ ta mũndũ mũae; vaikethĩwe mũndũ o na ũmwe ũvitha ĩvĩtyo yĩĩ. 
Job16:19 O na yu ngũsĩ yakwa yĩ ĩtunĩ, ũla ũndeteaa ekalaa ĩũlũ." 
Job16:20 Anyanyawa nĩmambũthasya; nĩtĩkasya methoi ngĩvoya Ngai. 
Job16:21 Mwa kethĩwa ve o mũndũ ũmbĩsũvanĩa vala ve Ngai, o ũndũ mũndũ wĩsũvanaa kwondũ wa mũnyanyae!" 
Job16:22 Nyie ndialĩtye myaka mĩnini, na ĩndĩ ngĩthi kyalo ndakasyoka.”" 
Job18:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma nthĩ ya Sui, wasũngĩie kwa kũkũlya atĩĩ," 
Job18:2 “Wĩneena nginya ĩndĩĩ? Neena maũndũ ũsũanĩĩte nesa, naitũ nĩtũũneena." 
Job18:3 We wĩtũtw'ĩkĩthya ng'ombe nĩkĩ? Wĩona twĩ atumanu nĩkĩ? 
Job18:4 We wĩĩka kwĩyĩũmĩsya na ũthatu waku. Wĩona nthĩ ta ĩtonya kũtiwa yĩ nthei nũndũ waku? Wĩona iĩma ta ithamw'a nĩ kana wĩanĩwe? 
Job18:5 Kyeni kya mũndũ mũthũku kĩkavow'a; ũmũĩ wa mwaki wake ndũkakena ĩngĩ. 
Job18:6 Kyeni kĩla kĩ nyũmbanĩ yake kĩkatw'ĩka kĩvindu; taa ũla wĩ vakuvĩ nake ũkavoa. 
Job18:7 Vinya wa matambya make ũkaolwa; mĩvango yake mwene nĩmũvalũkasya. 
Job18:8 Maũũ make nĩmamũlikasya kĩteinĩ, nĩmamũlikasya ĩimanĩ." 
Job18:9 Kĩtei nĩkĩmũkwatĩlasya kĩtiinyonĩ, mũteo ũmũkwataa ũkamũlũmya." 
Job18:10 Mũndũ ũsu nũvithĩwe kĩtei kya ĩkanda nthĩ, nĩwiĩwe mũteo nzĩanĩ yake." 
Job18:11 Motĩsyo maingĩ nĩmamũtelemasya kuma kĩla ngalĩko, nĩmamũatĩĩaa kĩla vandũ." 
Job18:12 Vinya wake nũminĩtwe nĩ nzaa; thĩna mũnene nũmweteele avalũka. 
Job18:13 Ũwau mũthũku nũĩsaa kĩkonde kyake, ũwau wũaa nũĩsaa mamutha make." 
Job18:14 Nĩwumaw'a ũsũvĩonĩ wa nyũmba yake, na aitwawa na vinya vala ve mũsumbĩ wa motĩsyo." 
Job18:15 Vai kĩndũ kĩtialĩte nyũmbanĩ yake, lavuti nũnyaĩĩkĩw'e vala wĩkalaa." 
Job18:16 Ethĩawa ta mũtĩ ũla wũmaa kuma mĩinĩ, nginya ĩũlũ mbongenĩ." 
Job18:17 Ĩũlũ wa nthĩ vai mũndũ ũkamũlilikana, ĩsyĩtwa yake yĩikawetwa ĩngĩ andũnĩ." 
Job18:18 Mũndũ ũsu nũsembethaw'a kuma nthĩ ya ala me thayũ, nũvetawa kuma kyeninĩ akatwawa kĩvindunĩ." 
Job18:19 Ndethĩawa na syana kana nzũkũlũ katĩ wa andũ make, na vala wekalaa vai mũndũ ũtialaa." 
Job18:20 Andũ ma ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa nĩmasaanĩaw'a nĩ kĩla kĩmũkwatĩte, andũ ma wumĩlonĩ wa syũa nĩmakwatawa nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ." 
Job18:21 Kwa w'o asu nĩmo maũndũ ala makwataa mũndũ ũla ũtakĩaa Ngai, maũndũ asu nĩmo makwataa mũndũ ũla ũtamwĩsĩ Ngai.”" 
Job19:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job19:2 “Mwĩendeea kũnthĩny'a, na kũndilanga ilungu na ndeto syenyu nginya ĩndĩĩ?" 
Job19:3 Nĩmũnumangĩte mavinda maingĩ; inyw'ĩ mũikwĩw'a nthoni mũimbĩka naĩ? 
Job19:4 O na ethĩwa nĩ w'o nĩmbĩtĩtye, ĩvĩtyo yakwa yĩngonetye nyie mwene." 
Job19:5 Mwĩsũanĩa kana ninyw'ĩ aseo kũte nyie, na mwĩona mathĩna makwa ta wonany'o wa ĩvĩtyo yakwa." 
Job19:6 Ĩndĩ manyai kana nĩ Ngai ũmbĩkĩte naĩ, na akandea na kĩtei kyake." 
Job19:7 O na vala nĩnĩkayĩte ngasya, ‘Nĩnĩkĩtwe naĩ!’ Ndisũngĩawa. Nĩnĩtanĩte na wasya mũnene, ĩndĩ vai sila wa katĩ." 
Job19:8 Ngai nũvingĩte nzĩa syakwa syonthe ũkethĩa nditonya kũvĩta; nũvw'ĩkĩte nzĩa syakwa na kĩvindu. 
Job19:9 Ngai nũmbenete ndaĩa yakwa yonthe, na nĩwanangĩte nguma yakwa." 
Job19:10 Nũndembũangĩte ngalĩko syonthe nginya ngathela; nũkũĩte wĩkwatyo wakwa ta mũtĩ. 
Job19:11 Ũthatu wake wĩ ĩũlũ wakwa, ambonaa ta nĩ ũmwe wa amaitha make." 
Job19:12 Nguthu syake sya asikalĩ ma kaũ syũkaa syĩ vamwe, nĩsyĩyũmbanĩtye nĩ kana imbithũkĩe; nĩsyambĩte maeema masyo kwĩlingĩla nyũmba yakwa." 
Job19:13 Ngai nũtumĩte ana-a-asa makwa mandia, andũ ala nĩsĩ nĩmandiĩte vyũ." 
Job19:14 Andũ makwa ma mũsyĩ nĩmaendete kũasa, anyanyawa nĩmolĩtwe ninyie." 
Job19:15 Aeni ala mookaa mũsyĩ kwakwa nĩmolĩtwe ninyie; athũkũmi makwa ma aka mambosaa ta nĩ mũndũ matesĩ. Mambonaa ta nĩ mũeni 
Job19:16 Nĩtaa mũthũkũmi wakwa ĩndĩ ailea kwĩtĩka, o na namwĩsũva andetheesye." 
Job19:17 Kĩveti kyakwa kĩitonya kũmĩĩsya mũuke wa mĩthũmũ yakwa; nĩtw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kĩte kya kwendeesya kwa ana ma mwaitũ. 
Job19:18 O na twana tũla tũnini nĩtũmbũthasya, yĩla naumĩla, nĩtũnthekeeaa." 
Job19:19 “Anyanyawa ala twĩsene mũno nĩmandeaa, ala nendete mũno nĩmandekete." 
Job19:20 Mwĩĩ wakwa ũtialĩte mavĩndĩ na kĩkonde, na ndialĩtye vanini nĩkw'e." 
Job19:21 Mbĩw'ĩei tei inyw'ĩ anyanyawa, mbĩw'ĩei tei, nũndũ Ngai nũngũnĩte." 
Job19:22 Inyw'ĩ mũnthĩnĩtye o ũndũ Ngai ũnthĩnĩtye nĩkĩ? Mũinesa kwĩanĩwa nĩ thĩna ũla mũnengete? 
Job19:23 “Mwa kethĩwa ndeto syakwa niandĩkwa! Mwa kethĩwa niandĩkwa ĩvukunĩ! 
Job19:24 Mwa kethĩwa niandĩkwa ĩvianĩ kwa kũtemeleelwa na kĩandĩki kya kyũma, nĩ kana iikaavutĩke tene na tene." 
Job19:25 Nũndũ nyie nĩnĩsĩ kana Mwovosya wakwa e thayũ, na kana mũminũkĩlyonĩ akaũngama ĩũlũ wa nthĩ andetee." 
Job19:26 O na ĩtina wa kĩkonde kyakwa kwanangĩka, ngamwona Ngai nĩ na mwĩĩ ũũ." 
Job19:27 Nyie mwene ngamwona, nyie mwene, na ti mũndũ ũngĩ. Ngoo yakwa yeteelete ũu na mea maingĩ!" 
Job19:28 Ethĩwa inyw'ĩ mwĩkũlya, ‘Tũtonya kwĩka ata tũkatuma athĩna mũno?’ Na ethĩwa mwĩasya, ‘Thĩna wake wumanĩte nake mwene,’" 
Job19:29 inyw'ĩ ene nĩmwaĩlĩte kũkĩa ũkany'o, kĩmena kyenyu kĩkatuma mũkanw'a, na nĩvo mwĩmanya kana ve ũmwe ũla ũsilĩlaa.”" 
Job20:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Nzovali kuma Naamathi wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job20:2 “Mosũanĩo makwa nĩmeũtuma nenda ũkũsũngĩa, nũndũ nĩngũthĩnĩka mũno." 
Job20:3 Ndeto ila waneena nĩ sya kũumana, ĩndĩ nũndũ nĩ na ũmanyi nĩngũũsũngĩa." 
Job20:4 “Kwa w'o we nĩwĩsĩ kana kuma tene, kuma tene yĩla Ngai woombie mũndũ," 
Job20:5 ũtanu wa mũndũ mũthũku ndwĩkalaa ĩvinda ĩasa, na ũtanu wa mũndũ ũla ũtamwĩsĩ Ngai wĩthĩawa o kwa kavinda." 
Job20:6 O na ethĩwa nguma yake yambataa nginya matunĩ, na mũtwe wake ũvikĩte mathweonĩ," 
Job20:7 mũndũ ũsu akaa tene na tene ta kĩtoo kĩla kĩũlũkaw'a nĩ kĩseve; andũ ala mamwĩsĩ makakũlasya, ‘We aĩva?’" 
Job20:8 Akaa ta ndoto, atakoneka ĩngĩ; akaa ta woni ũla wonekaa ũtukũ." 
Job20:9 Andũ ala mamwonie maikamwona ĩngĩ; mũsyĩ wake ndũkamwona ĩngĩ. 
Job20:10 Syana syake ikamantha ũseo kuma kwa ngya, na ikatũnga ũthwii wake ũla wooyie kuma kwa ngya." 
Job20:11 Mwĩĩ wake, ũla ĩvindanĩ yĩmwe wausũĩtwe nĩ vinya wa ũika, ũkakoma kĩtoonĩ." 
Job20:12 Kanyw'anĩ wake ũthũku wĩ mũyo, aũvithaa ungu wa ũĩmĩ wake." 
Job20:13 Ndendaa kũekana naw'o o na vanini, ĩndĩ awĩkalasya kanyw'anĩ wake." 
Job20:14 Ĩndĩ ĩvunĩ yake lĩu wake nũmeasya wũũ, ũmeasya wũũ ta sumu." 
Job20:15 Mũndũ mũthũku akatavĩka ũthwii ũla wooyie, Ngai nũtumaa aũtavĩka kuma ĩvunĩ yake." 
Job20:16 Kĩla mũndũ mũthũku ũmelasya nĩ ta sumu, kĩtumaa akw'a ta ũũmĩtwe nĩ nzoka ya kĩko." 
Job20:17 Ndakatanĩa mbũsĩ, tũlũsĩ tusĩe ũkĩ wa nzũkĩ na mauta ma ĩia." 
Job20:18 No nginya atũnge syĩndũ ila ũthũkũmĩte akakwata atanamba kũitũmĩa; ndakatanĩa ũsyao ũla ũkwatĩte kumana na kũtandĩthya kwake. 
Job20:19 Nũndũ nũthĩnĩtye ngya na akaitia ite na kĩndũ; mũndũ ũsu nĩwosete nyũmba ila ũtaaka. 
Job20:20 Nũndũ ĩtomo yake yĩithelaa, ndatonya kũeka kĩndũ o na kĩva kĩtiale." 
Job20:21 Vai kĩndũ kĩtialaa amina kũya lĩu, kwoou ũtanu wake ũkathela." 
Job20:22 Yĩla wĩĩthĩwa e na kĩla kĩndũ, akakwatwa nĩ thĩna, akaũmĩw'a vyũ nĩ thĩna." 
Job20:23 Aendee kũvũnĩthya ĩvu yake, Ngai akamũkany'a athatĩte mũno, na kũmũtulũĩla ũthatu wĩthĩwe lĩu wake." 
Job20:24 O na vala nũsembaa akĩĩte mũio wa kaũ wa kyũma, ĩangi yĩna mũthya wa kyũma kya mbulonzi nĩyĩmũtonyaa mũkuthũ." 
Job20:25 Nũyĩkũaa kuma mũongonĩ wake, nũyĩkũaa kuma ĩtemanĩ yake mũthya wayo ũtisatisĩte, na w'ĩa mwingĩ nũkwataa ngoo yake." 
Job20:26 Ũthwii wake ũkaanangĩka vyũ; mwaki ũla ũtaakwatw'a nĩ mũndũ ũkamũmina; ũkamina kĩla kĩtialĩte nyũmba kwake. 
Job20:27 Ĩtu yĩkaumĩlya mavĩtyo make ũtheinĩ, na nthĩ ĩkakũsĩĩa mavĩtyo make." 
Job20:28 Ũthwii wake w'onthe ũkaanangwa, ũkakuwa mũthenyanĩ wa ũthatu mũnene wa Ngai." 
Job20:29 Kĩu nĩkyo Ngai ũnengae mũndũ mũthũku, nĩw'o ũtiĩwa ũla Ngai ũmũtw'ĩĩe.”" 
Job21:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job21:2 “Ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto syakwa nesa, ngiakisyei kwa kũmbĩthukĩĩsya." 
Job21:3 Ũmĩĩsyai nambe kũneena, na namina kũneena nĩmũtonya kũendeea kũmbũthya." 
Job21:4 “Nyie ndiũnyungunyĩsya kũla kwĩ mũndũ, nĩ na kĩtumi kĩseo kya kwĩthĩwa ndomĩĩsya." 
Job21:5 Nzisyei na mũisaanĩw'a, nginya mũkunĩke makanyw'a menyu na moko." 
Job21:6 Nasũanĩa maũndũ ala mangwatĩte, nĩngũtelema; mwĩĩ wakwa nũũthĩlĩa." 
Job21:7 Nĩkũlya, Ngai aekaa andũ athũku maendee kwĩkala thayũ nĩkĩ? Aekaa makũe na kũendeea nesa nĩkĩ?" 
Job21:8 Nĩmonaa syana syoo iyĩendeea nesa, o na nĩmekalaa thayũ makona esũkũũe mayĩana." 
Job21:9 Mekalaa na mũuo nyũmbanĩ syoo mateũkĩa; Ngai ndamakanasya. 
Job21:10 Kĩla ĩvinda moi yavingĩanĩw'a na nzaũ nĩsyaa, ng'ombe syoo nga nisyaanaa ite kũvuna." 
Job21:11 Twana twoo tũithaũka nĩtũthaanyũkangaa ta tũtena twa malondu. Nĩtũsũngaa," 
Job21:12 na kwina wathi ũkũnĩtwe ndambulĩnĩ na ngitaa nini, na kũtanĩa wasya wa mũtũlilũ." 
Job21:13 Mĩthenya ya thayũ woo yĩthĩawa na moseo, na mesaa kũkw'a me na mũuo." 
Job21:14 Andũ athũku meaa Ngai atĩĩ, ‘Ekana naitũ! Tũikwenda kũmanya nzĩa syaku." 
Job21:15 Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nĩwe ũũ, nĩ kana tũmũthũkũme? Na tũkwataa ũtandĩthyo mwaũ twamũvoya?’" 
Job21:16 Maasya maendeeaa nesa kumana na vinya woo, kwoou ndyĩtĩkĩla ũtao wa andũ asu athũku." 
Job21:17 Nĩkũlya, ve ĩvinda taa wa ala athũku waaĩsa kũvow'a? Ve ũmwe woo waakwata thĩna mũnene? Ngai aaĩsa kũkany'a ala athũku ũthatunĩ wake," 
Job21:18 na kũmaũlũkya ũndũ mavuti maũlũkaw'a nĩ kĩseve, kana ũndũ kĩuutani kĩũlũkasya kĩtoo?" 
Job21:19 Inyw'ĩ mwĩasya, ‘Ngai akaĩvanĩsya syana syoo nũndũ wa naĩ syoo.’ Aiee, Ngai nĩamakany'e nũndũ wa naĩ syoo, nĩ kana mo mamanye ũu." 
Job21:20 Eki ma naĩ nĩmakwate ũkany'o woo ene, nĩmeyonee ene ũthatu wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe." 
Job21:21 Thayũ woo wa kũũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ wathela, maitethasya andũ moo ala matiwa ĩtina." 
Job21:22 Ve mũndũ ũtonya kũmanyĩsya Ngai, Ngai ũla ũsilĩlaa o na ala mekalaa ĩtunĩ?" 
Job21:23 Andũ amwe nĩmakusaa mena vinya w'onthe, me asũvĩĩku vyũ na me eanĩe," 
Job21:24 mĩĩ yoo yĩ na mauta, na mavĩndĩ moo mausĩe mũthungo." 
Job21:25 Angĩ nĩmakusaa me na woo ngoonĩ, mataaĩsa kwĩthĩwa na ĩvinda ya ũtanu." 
Job21:26 Ĩndĩ onthe makw'a mathikawa mũthanganĩ, na onthe nĩmaĩsawa nĩ iinyũ." 
Job21:27 Nĩnĩsĩ mosũanĩo menyu, na mĩvango yenyu ya kũmbĩka naĩ." 
Job21:28 Inyw'ĩ mũkũlasya, ‘Ĩĩva yu nyũmba ya ũla mũndũ wĩ nguma, nyũmba ĩla ala andũ athũku mekalaa.’" 
Job21:29 No mwaakũlya aendi ma kyalo? No mwaaĩthukĩĩsya ũndũ maisye," 
Job21:30 kana mũndũ mũthũku nũsũvĩawa ĩvindanĩ ya wanangĩko, nũvonokaw'a ĩvindanĩ ya ũthatu?" 
Job21:31 Vai mũndũ ũsikataa ũla mũthũku, kana kũmũĩvanĩsya maũndũ ala wĩkĩte." 
Job21:32 Mũndũ mũthũku nũtwaawa mbũanĩ, na mbũa yake ĩisungwa." 
Job21:33 Andũ aingĩ nĩmaendaa mathikonĩ make, na mũthanga ndũmũtumbĩĩaa mũno." 
Job21:34 Kwoou mũtonya ata kũngiakisya na ndeto sya mana? Vai ũndũ ũngĩ ũtiele kuma mosũngĩonĩ menyu ate o ũvũngũ.” 
Job22:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Elivasi, kuma ndũanĩ ya Temani wasũngĩie kwa kũkũlya atĩĩ," 
Job22:2 “Mũndũ nũtonya kũtethya Ngai na ũndũ o na wĩva? O na mũndũ ũla mũĩ vyũ no amũtethye? 
Job22:3 Nĩkũlya, kwĩthĩwa wĩ mũlũngalu nĩkũtanĩthya Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe? Akwataa ũtandĩthyo mwaũ nũndũ wa ũlũngalu waku?" 
Job22:4 Kwĩthĩwa wĩ na kĩkĩo nĩkw'o kũtumaa akũkany'a, na kũituma akũsilĩla?" 
Job22:5 Aiee, ekaa ũu nũndũ nũvĩtĩtye mũno, nũndũ wa mothũku onthe ala ũtaekaa kwĩka." 
Job22:6 Wosaa syĩndũ sya andũ ma mũsyĩ waku nĩ kana makũĩve kĩla wamakovethya. Nĩwosaa ngũa syoo makatiwa me athei. 
Job22:7 Ala me na mĩnoo ndwaamanenga kĩw'ũ manyw'e, na nĩwavatie ala maĩ na nzaa lĩu." 
Job22:8 Nĩwatumie ũla wĩ ũtonyi osa nthĩ yonthe, na waeka ũla wĩ ndaĩa atũe vo." 
Job22:9 Nĩwaleile kũtetheesya aka ndiwa, na wooyĩa na kũthĩny'a syana ndiwa." 
Job22:10 Kwoou yu ũthyũlũlũkĩtwe nĩ mĩteo, na nũkwatawa nĩ w'ĩa ũteũmanya." 
Job22:11 Kwĩna kĩvindu kingĩ ũkethĩa ndwene kĩndũ, na ũvw'ĩkĩtwe nĩ kĩw'ũ kingĩ." 
Job22:12 Nũndũ Ngai ũtekalaa ĩtunĩ ĩũlũ? Nũsiasya ndata syĩ ungu wake, o na vala syĩ ĩũlũ mũno!" 
Job22:13 Naku wĩkũlya, ‘Ngai esĩ kyaũ? Nũthw'ĩkĩtwe nĩ matu, atonya kũtũsilĩla ata?’" 
Job22:14 Wĩsũanĩa kana Ngai nũthw'ĩkawa nĩ matu ala makamu ndakatwone, ĩvindanĩ yĩla ũkũtembea esĩlĩte ĩũlũ wa yayaya." 
Job22:15 Nĩũkũlya, wĩendeea kwĩsĩla nzĩanĩ o ĩla ngũũ, ĩla andũ ala athũku mesĩle?" 
Job22:16 Nĩmavulilw'e ĩvinda yoo yĩte ĩviku, wambĩlĩĩlyo woo nĩwakuiwe nĩ kĩw'ũ kingĩ." 
Job22:17 Maneenie na Ngai mamwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Ekana naitũ!’ Na o ta ũu makũlya, ‘Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe atonya kũtwĩka ata?’" 
Job22:18 Ĩndĩ nowe watumie methĩwa me athwii. Nyie nditonya kũelewa nĩ mosũanĩo ma ala athũku. 
Job22:19 Andũ ala alũngalu nĩmatanaa moona Ngai aikany'a ala athũku. Ala mate ĩvĩtyo nĩmathekaa na kũvũthĩĩsya ala athũku," 
Job22:20 mayasya atĩĩ, ‘Kwa w'o kyonthe kĩla andũ athũku methĩawa nakyo nĩkyanangawa, na mwaki ũivĩvya kĩla kyatiala.’" 
Job22:21 Yu ĩndĩ Yovu, ĩw'ana na Ngai, na ũieka kũmwona ta mũmaitha waku. Weeka ũu, Ngai akakũathima." 
Job22:22 Ĩtĩkĩla motao ala ũkũũnenga; ĩkalya ndeto syake ngoonĩ yaku. 
Job22:23 Ethĩwa ũkeenyivya na ũisyokea Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe, na ũiekana na mothũku onthe ala mekĩkĩte mũsyĩnĩ waku," 
Job22:24 na ethĩwa ũkekya thaavu waku ĩtheka, thaavu waku kuma Ovili ũsĩnĩ mũng'alu," 
Job22:25 na ĩngĩ ethĩwa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe akatw'ĩka thaavu waku, na aitw'ĩka kwaku silĩva ũla mũseo vyũ," 
Job22:26 nĩvo ĩndĩ wĩtana nthĩnĩ wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe, na ũimanya kana nĩwe wumo wa ũtanu waku." 
Job22:27 Ũkamũvoyaa, nake akakũsũngĩaa, naku ũyĩanĩĩsya mawĩvĩto maku." 
Job22:28 Maũndũ onthe ala wavanga makeanĩaw'a, na kyeni kĩkakenaa nzĩanĩ syaku." 
Job22:29 Nũndũ Ngai nũvalũkasya ala mekathĩĩaa, ĩndĩ nũtangĩĩaa ala menyivasya." 
Job22:30 Nũvonokasya ũla wĩ na ĩvĩtyo, ĩĩ, akakũvonokya nũndũ wa meko maku maseo.”" 
Job23:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job23:2 “O na yu nĩngũendeea kũnyungunyĩsya kũla kwĩ Ngai, nũndũ nĩngũluma, ĩkũna yake nĩ ĩnene." 
Job23:3 Kethĩwa tyo nĩsĩ vala ndonya kũmwona! Kethĩwa tyo nĩvika wĩkalonĩ wake! 
Job23:4 No nĩmũtavye thĩna wakwa, na ngĩmũtavya mathĩna makwa onthe." 
Job23:5 No nĩmanye ũsũngĩo ũla ũnenga, na ngĩmanya ũndũ ũkũmbĩa." 
Job23:6 Ngai nũtonya kũtũmĩa vinya wake w'onthe nĩ kana anzinde? Aiee, ethukĩĩsya ũndũ ngũmwĩa." 
Job23:7 Vau nĩthĩwa ndonya kũsũanĩa nĩ na ũla mũlũngalu, na ngĩekewa vyũ nĩ mũsili wakwa." 
Job23:8 Nĩnĩmanthĩte Ngai ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa, ĩndĩ ndevo, yĩla namũmanthie ngalĩko ya ũthũĩlonĩ wa syũa, ndyaamwona." 
Job23:9 Nĩnĩmũmanthĩte ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ, na ndiũmwona, o ta ũu nĩnĩmũmanthĩte ngalĩko ya ĩtheo, ĩndĩ o na vau ndiũmwona." 
Job23:10 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo, Ngai nĩwĩsĩ maũndũ onthe ala nĩkaa, yĩla wĩndata akeethĩa nĩ mũtheu ta thaavu." 
Job23:11 Nĩatĩĩaa nzĩa yake kwa ũĩkĩĩku, nĩatĩĩe nzĩa yake ndekwathũka." 
Job23:12 Ndyaaĩsa kũtia mĩao yake, nĩniĩte ndeto syake ngoonĩ yakwa." 
Job23:13 Ndaalyũkaa. Nũũ ũtonya kũmũkananĩsya? Ekaa ũndũ ũkwenda. 
Job23:14 Akeanĩsya mũvango wake ĩũlũ wakwa, ũsu no ũmwe katĩ wa mĩvango mingĩ ĩla wĩ nayo." 
Job23:15 Kĩu nĩkyo kĩtumi nĩ na w'ĩa nĩ mbee wake, nasũanĩa ĩũlũ wa maũndũ asu nĩngũmũkĩa." 
Job23:16 Ngai nũtumĩte ndethĩwa na ũkũmbaũ, Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nũndelemetye." 
Job23:17 Ĩndĩ o na kĩvindu kĩituma ngilya, kĩvindu kĩkamu kĩla kĩvw'ĩkĩte ũthyũ wakwa.”" 
Job24:1 “Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe aleaa kũvanga mavinda ma ũsilĩlo nĩkĩ? Ala mamwĩsĩ maleaa kũmanya mĩthenya ĩsu nĩkĩ? 
Job24:2 Andũ nĩmathamasya makonge ma mũvaka; nĩmoyaa ndĩthya sya mbũi na malondu na kũiĩthya. 
Job24:3 Nĩmosaa ĩng'oi ya syana ndiwa, na mayosa nzaũ ya mũndũ mũka ndiwa nginya aĩve thiĩ wake." 
Job24:4 Nĩmasiĩĩaa ngya ndĩkakwate kĩla kĩmyaĩlĩte, na maituma ngya isemba na kwĩvitha." 
Job24:5 Kwoou ala ngya nĩmamanthaa lĩu weũnĩ ta mang'oi ma kĩthekanĩ. Vai vandũ vangĩ matonya kũkwata lĩu wa syana syoo. 
Job24:6 Ngya nikethaa mĩũndanĩ ĩte yoo, nikolanasya nzavivũ mũũndanĩ wa mĩsavivũ wa mũndũ mũthũku." 
Job24:7 Ũtukũ makomaa me athei matena ngũa sya kwĩvw'ĩka, mayĩthĩawa na kĩndũ kya kwĩvw'ĩka maikew'e mbevo." 
Job24:8 Nĩmauĩĩawa nĩ mbua ĩla yuaa iĩmanĩ, na mayĩvitha mavianĩ nũndũ mai na vandũ va kwĩseseea." 
Job24:9 Andũ athũku nĩmosaa kana kakw'ĩĩwe nĩ ĩthe wako, kuma ũsũvĩonĩ wa inyia wako, nĩmosaa kana ka ngya kwondũ wa kũĩvĩa thiĩ." 
Job24:10 Andũ ala ngya maendaa mate na ngũa sya kwĩvw'ĩka, mekalaa na nzaa o maendee na kũketha nganũ." 
Job24:11 Nĩmavivaa mĩthata maumye mauta na nzavivũ maumye ndivai, ĩndĩ mo ene methĩawa na waũni." 
Job24:12 Ala maendee kũkw'a nĩmew'ĩkaa ndũanĩ mailuma, na mathayũ ma ala aũmĩsye nĩmakayaa matetheew'e, ĩndĩ Ngai ndethukĩĩasya mboya syoo." 
Job24:13 “Ve andũ maleaa kyeni; maieleawa nĩkyo, kana kũthi vala kĩmatongoeasya kũthi." 
Job24:14 Kwakya tene mũaani nũamũkaa, na aithi kũaa ngya na athĩni, na ũtukũ nĩ kĩng'ei." 
Job24:15 Mũndũ kĩlaalai eteelaa kũtuke, nũvw'ĩkaa ũthyũ wake na kwasya, ‘Ndimanyĩka nĩ mũndũ.’" 
Job24:16 Ing'ei nitũlaa nyũmba ũtukũ, ĩndĩ mũthenya nĩsyĩvingĩaa nyũmba, iyĩsĩ mũthenya kwĩthĩawa kũilyĩ ata." 
Job24:17 Kwa ing'ei syonthe kĩvindu kĩkamu nĩ ũndũ ũmwe na kwakya, nĩkwĩthĩwa nĩmendeeaw'a nĩ motĩsyo ma kĩvindu kĩkamu." 
Job24:18 “Andũ asu nĩ ĩvũyũ yĩ kĩw'ũnĩ ĩũlũ, kĩlungu kyoo kya nthĩ nĩkĩumanĩe, nĩ kana mũndũ o na wĩva ndakathi mĩũndanĩ yoo ya mĩsavivũ." 
Job24:19 O tondũ ĩa yĩthelaa nũndũ wa muutĩa na mũnyao, now'o ala mekaa naĩ mathelaa kuma nthĩ ya ala me thayũ." 
Job24:20 Aa inyia moo maimalilikanaa o na vanini, nĩmalĩkaa nĩ iinyũ na kwanangwa ta mĩtĩ mĩteme." 
Job24:21 Andũ athũku nĩmathĩnasya mũndũ mũka ngũngũ, mayĩw'ĩaa ndiwa tei." 
Job24:22 Ĩndĩ Ngai vinyanĩ wake nũvetangaa ala me ũtonyi, o na kau nĩmethĩawa na syĩndũ mai na wĩkwatyo thayũnĩ woo." 
Job24:23 Ngai nũtonya kũmaeka mathũmũe vala mekwĩw'a me ũsũvĩonĩ, ĩndĩ nĩwonaa maũndũ ala mekaa." 
Job24:24 Andũ athũku nĩmaendeeaa nesa vandũ va kavinda kanini, ĩndĩ nĩmathelaa ta ĩia yooma, ta iia sya nganũ ngethe." 
Job24:25 Ethĩwa ũu ti w'o, nũũ ũla ũtonya kũleana na ndeto syakwa, na kũtuma ndeto syakwa syĩthĩwa syĩ sya mana?”" 
Job25:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Mbilitati kuma Sui wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job25:2 “Ngai nĩ mũsumbĩ na nĩwaĩlĩte kũkĩwa; nũtumaa ĩtunĩ ĩũlũ kwĩthĩwa na mũuo. 
Job25:3 Nĩkũlya, ve mũndũ ũtonya kũtala asikalĩ make ma kaũ? Ve vandũ kyeni kyake kĩtakenaa?" 
Job25:4 Mũndũ atonya ata kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu mbee wa Ngai? Mũndũ ũla ũsyaĩtwe nĩ mũndũ mũka atonya ata kwĩthĩwa e mũtheu? 
Job25:5 Ethĩwa mbee wa Ngai o na mwei ndwĩthĩawa na kyeni, nasyo ndata syumasya kyeni kĩnini," 
Job25:6 mũndũ nake nĩ ata? Nĩ mwenya, mũndũ kwa w'o nĩ kĩinyũ!”" 
Job26:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Yovu wasũngĩie asya atĩĩ," 
Job26:2 “Mwa nũtethetye ala mate na vinya! Nũtangĩĩte andũ ala matetonya! 
Job26:3 Nũnengete ũtao nyie mũndũ ũte na ũmanyi, na kũmbuanĩsya kwĩthĩwa na ũĩ mwingĩ nyie mũndũ mũtumanu!" 
Job26:4 Ũla ũkũtetheesye ũneene ndeto ii nũũ? Ũla ũkũnengie ndeto ii ũneene nũũ?” 
Job26:5 “Maveva ma ala akw'ũ, ala me vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa, kĩw'ũnĩ na ku nthĩ, me thĩnanĩ mũnene." 
Job26:6 Ngai nĩwene vala maveva ma ala akw'ũ mekalaa, vai kĩndũ kĩvakunĩkĩte." 
Job26:7 Ngai nĩwiĩte yayaya ya ngalĩko ya ĩũlũ vala yaĩlĩte, nũsũĩtye nthĩ ĩtakwetwe nĩ kĩndũ." 
Job26:8 Ngai nĩwe wusũasya matu na kĩw'ũ, na nĩwe ũtumaa matatembũwa nĩ ũito wa kĩw'ũ." 
Job26:9 Ngai nĩwe ũvw'ĩkaa mwei wĩ mũima, nũtambũũkasya matu make makaũvw'ĩka." 
Job26:10 Nĩwaanisye kyeni na kĩvindu, kwa kwia mũvaka wa kĩthyũlũlũ ũkanganĩ." 
Job26:11 Ituĩ ila itw'ĩĩkĩte matu nithingithaw'a nĩ w'ĩa, yĩla Ngai wavanga kũsyananga." 
Job26:12 Nĩwavindĩthisye ũkanga na vinya wake; nĩwatilangile Laavi ilungu aitũmĩa ũĩ wake. 
Job26:13 Veva wake nũvetangaa matu kũkathea; kw'oko kwake nĩkwooaie nzoka ĩnyolokete mĩtũkĩ. 
Job26:14 Ĩndĩ aa no maũndũ mavũthũ ma vinya wa Ngai, tũmaũndũ tũla twĩw'ĩte ĩũlũ wake nĩ tũnini. Kwoou nũũ ũla ũtonya kũmanya ũnene wa vinya wake?”" 
Job27:1 Yovu nĩwaendeeie na ũneeni wake asya atĩĩ," 
Job27:2 “O tondũ Ngai wĩ thayũ, ũla ũmbatĩte sila wa katĩ, Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe ũla ũtumĩte thayũ wakwa wĩthĩwa na thĩna," 
Job27:3 ĩvindanĩ yonthe ya thayũ wakwa, na ĩvindanĩ yĩla veva wa Ngai wĩ manyiũũnĩ makwa," 
Job27:4 nyie ndikaneena ũndũ ũthũku, na ũĩmĩ wakwa ndũkaweta ũvũngũ." 
Job27:5 Ndikamũtalĩla inyw'ĩ ũlũngalu nongi, ndikaaĩsa kwasya kana nĩna ĩvĩtyo nĩkĩte o na mũthenyanĩ wa kĩkw'ũ kyakwa." 
Job27:6 Ndikaeka kwasya kana nĩ mũlũngalu, wasya wa ngoo yakwa nĩ mũseo." 
Job27:7 Mũmaitha wakwa nĩethĩwe ta mũndũ mũthũku, ũla ũleanaa nakwa nĩethĩwe ta mũndũ ũte mũlũngalu." 
Job27:8 Nũndũ wĩkwatyo wa ũla ũtamwĩsĩ Ngai nĩ mwaũ, ĩvindanĩ yĩla Ngai woosa thayũ wake?" 
Job27:9 Nĩkũlya, yĩla mũndũ ũsu wakwatwa nĩ thĩna, Ngai nĩwĩw'aa kĩĩo kyake?" 
Job27:10 Mũndũ ũsu akatana mbee wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe? Akeekaĩlaa Ngai mavinda onthe? 
Job27:11 Eka ngũmanyĩsye ũndũ ũtonyi wa Ngai ũnenevete, na ũkũelesya ndeũkũvitha mũvango wa Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe." 
Job27:12 Inyw'onthe nĩmwĩyoneete; yu ĩndĩ mwĩneena maũndũ aa ma mana nĩkĩ? 
Job27:13 Ũũ nĩw'o Ngai wĩkanaa na ala athũku, ũtiĩwa ũla andũ mate tei makwataa kuma kwa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe." 
Job27:14 Nĩmatonya kwĩthĩwa na ana aingĩ, ĩndĩ onthe mayũaĩwa kaũnĩ. Nzyawa syoo iyĩsaa kwĩthĩwa na lĩu wĩanĩe." 
Job27:15 Ala mevonoka makooawa nĩ ũwau mũthũku, na o na iveti syoo iikaĩa nũndũ wa kĩkw'ũ kyoo." 
Job27:16 O na vala nĩmatonya kwĩthĩwa na silĩva mwingĩ ta kĩtoo, na kwĩthĩwa na ngũa itatalĩka," 
Job27:17 mũndũ mũĩkĩĩku akasyĩkĩa, na andũ alũngalu makaana silĩva ũsu." 
Job27:18 Mũndũ mũthũku nĩwakaa nyũmba iilyĩ ta ũlũalũĩ wa mbũambũĩ, kana ta kasũmba kakĩtwe nĩ mũndũ ũla ũsungaa." 
Job27:19 Esaa ũkoma e mũthwii, ĩndĩ ndakeka ũu ĩngĩ; aamũka ethĩaa ũthwii wake wĩ mũthelu." 
Job27:20 Okĩawa nĩ w'ĩa ta kĩw'ũ kya mbua mbingĩ; kĩseve kya ũtukũ nĩkĩuutanaa kĩkamũveta. 
Job27:21 Kĩseve kya kwananga kuma ngalĩko ya wumĩlonĩ wa syũa, kĩkamũvetanga kuma mũsyĩ kwake;" 
Job27:22 kĩkauutanĩa vala ũĩ vate tei, aendee kũtata ũndũ ũtonya evonokye." 
Job27:23 Kĩseve kĩkaendeea kũuutana asembete, kĩimũtelemya na vinya wa kwananga.”" 
Job28:1 “Kwa w'o ve ĩima yĩnzawa silĩva, ve vandũ thaavu ũtheeaw'a." 
Job28:2 Andũ menzaa kyũma kuma mũthanganĩ, na maitwekethya kyũma kĩtune kuma ĩvianĩ." 
Job28:3 Andũ ala menzaa syũma nĩmathũkũmaa maimanĩ makuĩte taa, nĩmamanthaa nginya kũndũ kũliku mũno, na mayĩnza mavia me kĩvindunĩ kĩkamu." 
Job28:4 Vaasa kuma vala andũ matũaa kana andũ mataaĩsa ũkinya, andũ nĩmenzaa maima. Nĩmathũkũmĩaa vau me oka me maimanĩ, masũĩte na makanda." 
Job28:5 Lĩu nĩwumaa ĩũlũ wa nthĩ, ĩndĩ ungu wa nthĩ ĩsu kwĩthĩawa kũyatũkanga ta kwĩ mwaki." 
Job28:6 Mavia ma nthĩ ĩsu methĩawa na tũvila twa thooa mũnene twĩtawa savaya, na kĩtoo kya nthĩ ĩsu kĩthĩawa na thaavu." 
Job28:7 Vai kĩlũĩ kĩsĩ nzĩa ya kũthi maimanĩ asu, vai ndei yaaĩsa kũmona." 
Job28:8 Nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ iyaaĩsa kwĩsĩla nzĩanĩ isu, mũnyambũ ndwaaĩsa kwĩsĩla vo." 
Job28:9 Andũ nĩmenzaa mavia momũ mũno, makenza iĩma ikathela kuma wambĩlĩĩlyonĩ wasyo." 
Job28:10 Maendee kũlika mavianĩ nthĩnĩ, nĩmethĩaa mavia ma thooa mũnene." 
Job28:11 Nĩmamanthaa kũla mbũsĩ syambĩlĩĩlye, na maiete kĩla kĩvithĩtwe ũtheinĩ." 
Job28:12 Ĩndĩ ũĩ ũtonya kwoneka va? Ũmanyi ũtũaa va? 
Job28:13 Mũndũ ndatonya kũmanya thooa waw'o; ũĩ ndũtonya kwoneka andũnĩ. 
Job28:14 Kũla kũliku ũkanganĩ mũnene kwaasya, ‘Ũĩ ndwĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa.’ O na ũkanga waasya, ‘Ũĩ ndwĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa.’" 
Job28:15 Ndũtonya kũthoowa na thaavu ũla mũseo vyũ, o na ndũtonya kũthooeka na ithimo sya silĩva." 
Job28:16 Ndũtonya kũthoowa na thaavu kuma Ovili, o na ndũtonya kũthoowa na mavia me thooa mũnene ma onekisi kana savaya." 
Job28:17 Wĩ thooa mũnene mbee wa thaavu kana kĩoo, mbee wa mĩio ya wanake ya thaavu mũseo mũno," 
Job28:18 Thooa wa ũĩ nĩ mũnene mbee wa mavia momũ ma ũkanganĩ, kana wa kĩoo kĩũtisa. Thooa wa ũĩ nĩ mũnene mbee wa tũvila twa thooa mũnene." 
Job28:19 Tũvila twa tovasi kuma Ethiovia tũitonya kwĩananw'a naw'o, o na thaavu ũla mũseo ndwĩanany'a thooa na ũĩ." 
Job28:20 Ũĩ yu ĩndĩ wumaa va? Na ũmanyi ũtũaa va? 
Job28:21 Vai kyũmbe kĩ thayũ kĩtonya kũwona, o na nyũnyi ĩũlũkĩte ndĩtonya kũwona." 
Job28:22 Wanangĩko na kĩkw'ũ ineenaa ikasya, ‘Twĩkaa o kwĩw'a na matũ maitũ ĩũlũ wa ũĩ.’" 
Job28:23 Ngai nowe wĩsĩ nzĩa ya kũthi vala ve ũĩ, na nĩwe wĩsĩ vala ũĩ ũtũaa." 
Job28:24 Nũndũ Ngai nĩwonaa o na kũvika kũla nthĩ ĩthelele, nĩwonaa kĩla kĩndũ ĩũlũ wa nthĩ." 
Job28:25 Yĩla Ngai wanengie kĩseve vinya wakyo, na avanga ũndũ ũkanga waĩlĩte kwĩthĩwa wĩana," 
Job28:26 na yĩla wavangie vala mbua yaĩlĩte kua, na nzĩa ĩla kĩtundumo kyaĩlĩte kwĩsĩla," 
Job28:27 ĩvindanĩ yĩu nĩw'o woonie ũĩ na aweta ĩũlũ wa w'o. Nĩwawonanisye na awumĩlya. 
Job28:28 Ngai nĩwaneenie na andũ amea atĩĩ, ‘Kũmũkĩa Mwĩai, ũsu nĩ ũĩ, na kũekana na naĩ nĩ ũmanyi.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Yovu nĩwaendeeie na ũneeni wake asya atĩĩ," 
Job29:2 “Mwa kethĩwa nĩilyĩ o tondũ nailyĩ myeinĩ ya navu tene, mĩthenyanĩ ĩla Ngai wanzũvĩaa." 
Job29:3 Yĩla taa wake wamulĩkĩlaa wĩ ĩũlũ wakwa, na nesĩlaa kĩvindunĩ ndongoew'e nĩ kyeni kyake." 
Job29:4 Yĩu nĩ ĩvinda yĩla naendee nesa, na ũnyanya wakwa na Ngai wasiĩĩaa mũsyĩ wakwa kuma ũthũkunĩ." 
Job29:5 Yĩla Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe waĩ vamwe nakwa, na syana syakwa syaĩ vakuvĩ nakwa," 
Job29:6 ng'ombe na mbũi syakwa syaumasya ĩia yingĩ, na ngetha ya mĩtĩ yakwa ya mĩthata yaumaa mauta maingĩ." 
Job29:7 Yĩla atumĩa moombanĩa mũvĩanĩ wa ndũa, nakwa ngĩkala vamwe namo," 
Job29:8 anake ma mũika mambona oou maũngamaa ũtee, na ala akũũ maũngamaa manenge ndaĩa." 
Job29:9 Atongoi ala maĩ ma ndaĩa nĩmaekaa kũneena, na kwĩkwata kanyw'a mony'e andũ nĩmakilye." 
Job29:10 Mawasya ma anene me ndaĩa nĩmavindĩthaw'a, na maieka kũneena." 
Job29:11 Mũndũ o na wĩva ambĩw'a nĩwaneeneaa nesa, na ala mambonaa maneenaa nesa ĩũlũ wakwa," 
Job29:12 nũndũ nĩnatangĩĩaa ngya ila syambĩkaĩlaa, na ala mataĩ na aaĩthe ma kũmatetheesya." 
Job29:13 Ala meethĩawa ũkyanĩ mũnene nĩmangumasya, na nĩnatethasya aka ndiwa methĩwe ũsũvĩonĩ." 
Job29:14 Neekĩaa ũlũngalu ta w'o ngũa yakwa, sila wa katĩ waĩ ta w'o ngũa yakwa ndaasa na ngovia yakwa." 
Job29:15 Nyie naĩ metho kwa ilalinda, na maũũ kwa ala me maũũ mathũku." 
Job29:16 Naĩ ĩthe wa ala athĩni, nĩneethukĩĩasya mavata ma aeni." 
Job29:17 Nĩnaanangaa ũtonyi wa andũ athũku, na kwovosya ala meũthĩnw'a nĩmo." 
Job29:18 Nasũanĩaa kana ngakw'ĩĩa mũsyĩ kwakwa, na ũkũũ wakwa ũyongeleka wingĩve ta kĩthangathĩ." 
Job29:19 Nyie nailyĩ ta mũtĩ ũnyaĩĩkĩtye mĩi yaw'o kĩw'ũnĩ, ũla mbonge syaw'o syĩthĩawa na ĩmwe ũtukũ w'onthe." 
Job29:20 Andũ onthe mangumasya kĩla ĩvinda, na vinya wakwa ndwaaĩsa kũnzonokya." 
Job29:21 Andũ nĩmambĩthukĩĩasya na kweteela, meeteelaa ũtao wakwa makilĩtye." 
Job29:22 Namina kũneena vai ũmwe waneenaa ĩngĩ, ndeto syakwa syalikaa matũnĩ moo na ũuu." 
Job29:23 Andũ mambeteelaa ũndũ meteelaa mbua, meethĩawa mailyĩ ta andũ meteelete mbua ya uũa." 
Job29:24 Yĩla makw'a ngoo nĩnamonasya ũthyũ wa ũtanu, ũthyũ wakwa wĩ na ũtanu nĩwamanengae wĩkwatyo." 
Job29:25 Nĩnamanyuvĩaa nzĩa na kwĩkala ta mũtongoi woo, natũaa ta mũsumbĩ e katĩ wa asikalĩ make ma kaũ; nailyĩ ta mũndũ ũla ũkiakiasya ala me na kyeva.”" 
Job30:1 “Ĩndĩ yu andũ nĩmeũmbũthya, andũ mate akũũ mbee wakwa. Aaĩthe moo maĩ andũ ma mana, ũkethĩa o na ndimanenga mwanya matetheesye ngitĩ syakwa kũsunga malondu." 
Job30:2 Vinya wa moko moo waĩ na ũtethyo mwaũ kwakwa, andũ o na mataĩ na ũthangaau?" 
Job30:3 Maĩ ngya mũno na maĩ na nzaa, ũkethĩa no makukute mĩi myũmũ, ũtukũ ithekanĩ, kũndũ kũte andũ." 
Job30:4 Nĩmakũaa mĩtĩ ya weũnĩ na kũmĩya, o na nĩmaĩsaa mĩi ya mũlutemu, ĩla ĩte mũsamo." 
Job30:5 Nĩmalũngaw'a kuma vala ve andũ moo, andũ mamalonzelaa ũndũ andũ maatĩĩe ing'ei malonzaa." 
Job30:6 Vate ũndũ ũngĩ nĩmaendie kũtũa matw'ĩkunĩ, maimanĩ menze nthĩ na mavianĩ." 
Job30:7 Kuma ikuthunĩ nĩmanasya ta nyamũ, na kũmbanĩa syĩnyeelyanĩ." 
Job30:8 Nĩ syana sya ndia, syana sya andũ ma mana, nĩmalũngilw'e na mĩsalisa kuma nthĩ." 
Job30:9 Yu mokaa na kũnthekeea, nyie ndw'ĩkĩte kĩndũ kya kũvũthw'a nĩmo." 
Job30:10 Nĩmaleanaa nakwa na kwĩkala vaasa nakwa, o na mayĩthĩawa na nzika maindw'ĩlanga mata ũthyũ." 
Job30:11 Nũndũ Ngai nũndw'ĩte kyonze na mũndũ ũtetethya, membĩka naĩ me na woo mwingĩ." 
Job30:12 Nguthu sya andũ moo nimbithũkĩaa, nĩmandũngasya nzembete; nĩmeyũmbanĩasya ĩvinda yoo ya mũthya ya kũmbĩka naĩ." 
Job30:13 Nĩmanangaa nzĩa yakwa ya kũkĩĩla na maitata kũmbĩka naĩ, na vai mũndũ ũmasiĩĩaa." 
Job30:14 Mokaa mailyĩ ta mekumĩlĩĩla kĩtonyinĩ kĩnene, na ĩtina wa kũmbithũkĩa maiendeea na mbee." 
Job30:15 Nayu nĩngwatĩtwe nĩ w'ĩa mwingĩ mũno, maatĩĩe ndaĩa yakwa ta kĩseve, na kũendeea kwakwa nesa kũvĩtũkĩte ta ĩtu." 
Job30:16 Yu ngilĩlye kũkw'a, nĩ mĩthenyanĩ ya mathĩna." 
Job30:17 Mavĩndĩ makwa onthe nĩmekwalya ũtukũ, kyalya kĩla kĩũnthĩny'a kĩiolekaa." 
Job30:18 Ngai nũngwatĩte ngũanĩ syakwa na vinya mũnene, andũmĩtye ta kala ya ngũa yakwa." 
Job30:19 Nũmbĩkĩtye ndakanĩ, nakwa ndw'ĩkĩte ta kĩtoo na mũu." 
Job30:20 Ame Ngai nĩngwĩtĩte ĩndĩ ndũũnzũngĩa, yĩla ngũũvoya, ndũmbĩthukĩĩasya." 
Job30:21 Wĩmbĩka maũndũ mathũku mũno, wĩngũna na vinya waku w'onthe." 
Job30:22 Ũmbũkĩlĩtye kĩsevenĩ na ũkatuma kĩngua, nũnduutangĩaa kĩuutaninĩ." 
Job30:23 Nĩnĩsĩ we ũndwaĩte kĩkw'ũnĩ, vandũnĩ vala vanyuvĩtwe kwa onthe ala me thayũ." 
Job30:24 Kwa w'o, vai mũndũ wĩkaa naĩ mũndũ wĩ na thĩna, yĩla mũndũ ũsu wakũlya atetheew'e thĩnanĩ wake." 
Job30:25 Nĩkũlya, nũndũ nyie ndaaĩa nũndũ wa ala me thĩnanĩ? Nũndũ ngoo yakwa ĩtaaĩthĩwa na kyeva nũndũ wa ala me na thĩna?" 
Job30:26 Ĩndĩ ũu wĩ o vo, yĩla namanthaa ũseo, ũthũku nĩwookie; Yĩla namanthaa kyeni, kĩvindu nĩkyookie." 
Job30:27 Nĩna kĩũũyũ na woo ngoonĩ; nĩthĩĩtwe na thĩna kĩla mũthenya. 
Job30:28 Nangangaa kĩvindunĩ vate kyeni kya syũa; nĩũngamaa andũnĩ ngĩsũvana ndetheew'e. 
Job30:29 Kĩĩo kyakwa kĩtumĩte ndw'ĩka ta mbĩwa; nyie na nyaa tũi kĩvathũkany'o. 
Job30:30 Kĩkonde kyakwa nĩ kiũ na nĩkĩũsyũlĩka, mwĩĩ wakwa wusĩe ndetema." 
Job30:31 Kwondũ wa ũu ngitaa yakwa nini nĩalyũkĩte ĩkaina wathi wa kyeva, mũtũlilũ wakwa wĩumya wasya wa kĩĩo.”" 
Job31:1 “Nĩnĩvĩtĩte ngathana kana, ndikaasisya mwĩĩtu na wendi mũthũku." 
Job31:2 Nĩkũlya, Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe ekanaa ata naitũ? Aĩvaa meko ma andũ ata?" 
Job31:3 Nũndũ andũ ala athũku matakwataa mathĩna, na eki ma naĩ maikwata wanangĩko?" 
Job31:4 Nũndũ Ngai ũtamanyaa maũndũ onthe ala nĩkaa, na kũatĩĩa kyonthe kĩla nĩkaa?" 
Job31:5 Nyie ndyaaĩsa kwĩka ũndũ ũthũku, ndyaaĩsa ũkengana." 
Job31:6 Ngai nĩanthime na kĩthimi kya w'o, na nũkũmanya kana ndi na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job31:7 Ethĩwa naaĩsa kuma nzĩanĩ ĩla ya w'o, na ngetĩkĩlya ngoo yakwa yendeew'e nĩ ũthũku, kana ethĩwa naathokoanw'a nĩ naĩ," 
Job31:8 nĩvo ĩndĩ nĩvanda, na ũngĩ aiya, na kyonthe kĩla kĩmea kĩikũangwa." 
Job31:9 “Ethĩwa naaendeew'a nĩ kĩveti kya mũtũi wakwa, na ngakyovya nzyaĩĩsye mũomonĩ wake," 
Job31:10 kĩveti kyakwa nĩkĩuĩe mũndũ-ũme ũngĩ, na kũmanyana kĩ-mwĩĩ na aũme angĩ." 
Job31:11 Nũndũ yĩu yĩthĩwa yĩ ĩvĩtyo ĩnene, ĩvĩtyo yaĩlĩte kumĩw'a ũtw'ĩo nĩ asili." 
Job31:12 Ũsu wĩthĩwa ũilyĩ mwaki ũla wanangaa, ũũvĩvya syĩndũ syakwa syonthe." 
Job31:13 Yĩla ũmwe wa athũkũmi makwa wanyungunyĩsya nũndũ wakwa, nĩnamwĩthukĩĩasya na ngĩmwĩka nesa." 
Job31:14 Kethĩwa ndyaaĩka ũu, nĩthĩwa nĩtonya kwĩa Ngai ata? Angũlya, nĩmũsũngĩa ata?" 
Job31:15 Ngai ũla woombie mũthũkũmi ũsu nowe wambũmbie, nĩwe watũmbie ithyonthe." 
Job31:16 “Ndyaalea kũtethya ngya, ndyaaĩtĩkĩla aka ndiwa mekale me akw'ũ ngoo." 
Job31:17 Ndyaaya lĩu wakwa nĩ nyioka, ngalea kũĩsanĩa na syana ndiwa." 
Job31:18 Nĩthĩĩtwe nĩilyĩ ta ĩthe woo, ĩvinda yonthe ya thayũ wakwa." 
Job31:19 Noona mũndũ ũkwenda kwaa nũndũ nde na ngũa, ngya ũkethĩa ndeyĩũĩa ngũa," 
Job31:20 nĩnamũnengae ngũa iseũvĩtw'e na w'ĩa wumĩte malondunĩ makwa. Nĩvo ĩndĩ mũndũ ũsu wangathimaa na ngoo yake yonthe. 
Job31:21 Ethĩwa nyie naaũkĩlya kw'oko kwakwa nĩtelemye kana ndiwa, nũndũ nĩnĩsĩ nĩngũsinda ĩkoani kotinĩ," 
Job31:22 kw'oko kwakwa kũtũlĩke, kũkavũke kuma kĩtuonĩ kyakwa." 
Job31:23 Nũndũ nĩnakĩaa Ngai ndakandetee ũndũ mũthũku, ndyaĩ nĩtĩkĩla kwĩka ũndũ ta ũsu." 
Job31:24 “Ethĩwa naatw'ĩkĩthya thaavu wĩkwatyo wakwa, kana ngeta thaavu mũseo mũno wĩvitho wakwa," 
Job31:25 ethĩwa naaĩkathĩĩa nũndũ wa ũthwii wakwa mwingĩ, kana ngekathĩĩa nũndũ wa ũkwati wakwa mwingĩ," 
Job31:26 kana ethĩwa naathaitha syũa nũndũ wa kyeni kyayo, kana mwei nũndũ wa ũtisu waw'o," 
Job31:27 na naluluutĩka nĩithaithe, kana nĩkumane nĩinenge ndaĩa," 
Job31:28 maũndũ asu o namo methĩwa me mavĩtyo ma kũsilĩlwa, nũndũ nĩthĩwa nakengie Ngai ũla wĩ ĩũlũ." 
Job31:29 Ndyaatana mũmaitha wakwa aanangwa, kana ngew'a mũyo akwatwa nĩ ũndũ mũthũku." 
Job31:30 Ndyaaĩtĩkĩla nĩke naĩ, kwa kũumanĩa thayũ wake." 
Job31:31 Andũ ala mekalaa mũsyĩ kwakwa nĩmesĩ, kana kĩla ĩvinda nĩnathokasya aeni." 
Job31:32 Vai mũendi wa kyalo waakoma nza nzĩanĩ, nĩnavingũĩaa ũla ũendete kyalo mĩomo yakwa." 
Job31:33 Ndyaavitha naĩ syakwa ũndũ andũ amwe mekaa, kwa kũvitha ĩvĩtyo yakwa ngoonĩ yakwa," 
Job31:34 nũndũ nĩnakĩaa wingĩ wa andũ, kana ngakĩa kĩvũthya kya mbaĩ, na ngavindya ngalea kumaala." 
Job31:35 “Kethĩwa ve o mũndũ ũmbĩthukĩĩsya, nĩngwĩvĩta kana kĩla ngwasya nĩ kya w'o. Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nĩanzũngĩe. Kethĩwa maũndũ ala mũmaitha wakwa ũnzikatĩte namo nĩmaandĩkwa ngamona," 
Job31:36 kwa w'o nyie nĩũmosa na kũmakua kĩtuonĩ kyakwa, na kũmailĩĩla mũtwenĩ wakwa ta kĩlaũnĩ." 
Job31:37 Nĩũtavya Ngai maũndũ onthe ala nĩkĩte, nĩthi vala ũĩ nĩilyĩ ta mũtongoi ũte na w'ĩa." 
Job31:38 “Ethĩwa naaũya mĩũnda ĩla nĩĩmaa, kana ngamĩvenana kuma kwa ene mayo," 
Job31:39 ethĩwa naaya lĩu ũla wavandĩtwe vo, na natuma aĩmi ala maũvandĩte mew'a nzaa," 
Job31:40 ĩia yĩ mĩw'a yĩmee vandũ va nganũ, na ĩia yĩimea vandũ va nganũ ĩla yĩtawa mbaale.” Yovu nĩwamina kũneena." 
Job32:1 Aũme asu atatũ: Elivasi, Mbilitati na Nzovali nĩmaekie kũsũngĩa Yovu nũndũ nĩweesĩ kana kwa w'o nde na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job32:2 Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli, nzyawa ya Mbusi kuma mũsyĩnĩ wa Lamu nĩwathatie mũno, nũndũ Yovu nĩweetalaa kwĩthĩwa e mũlũngalu na nĩwatũlaa Ngai mũtĩ." 
Job32:3 O ta ũu Eliu nĩwathatiw'e nĩ anyanyae asu atatũ ma Yovu. Mamũthatĩtye nũndũ nĩmaemiwe nĩ kwony'a Yovu ĩvĩtyo, na kwa nzĩa ĩsu matuma Ngai oneka ta we wĩ na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job32:4 Eliu eeteelile aneene na Yovu ala angĩ mamina kũneena nũndũ maĩ akũũ mbee wake. 
Job32:5 Yĩla Eliu woonie kana katĩ wa aũme asu atatũ vai ũmwe waĩ atonya kũsũngĩa Yovu, nĩwathatie." 
Job32:6 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliu mwana wa Mbalakeli nzyawa ya Mbusi waneenie asya atĩĩ, “Nyie nĩ mũndũ wa mũika, inyw'ĩ mwĩ akũũ; kwoou nĩĩ na w'ĩa kumya woni wakwa." 
Job32:7 Nĩvo nĩsũanĩie nasya, ‘Andũ ala akũũ nĩmaneene, na ala me na myaka mingĩ maimanyĩsya ũĩ.’" 
Job32:8 Ĩndĩ nĩ veva wa Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe, ũla ũlikaa nthĩnĩ wa mũndũ nĩ kana ethĩwe na ũmanyi." 
Job32:9 Ũkũũ ti w'o ũtumaa mũndũ ethĩwa e mũĩ, ti ala akũũ me oka mamanyaa ũla w'o." 
Job32:10 Kwoou nĩasya atĩĩ, ‘Mbĩthukĩĩsyei; o nakwa ekai numye woni wakwa.’" 
Job32:11 “Nĩthukĩĩsye ũneeni wenyu, nĩnĩwie ndeto syenyu sya ũĩ mũendee kũmantha kĩla mũũneena." 
Job32:12 Nĩnĩmwĩthukĩĩisye nesa, na vai ũmwe ũnoony'a Yovu kana nũvĩtĩtye, kana akasũngĩa makũlyo make." 
Job32:13 Ĩsũvĩei mũikese kwasya, ‘Nĩtwonie ũĩ; no Ngai ũtonya kũsũngĩa Yovu, ĩndĩ ti mũndũ.’" 
Job32:14 Yovu eneenaa nenyu, ti inyie, ĩndĩ ndisũngĩa Yovu ũndũ mwamũsũngĩa." 
Job32:15 Yovu, anyanyae maku nĩmavũavũana na masindwa, mai na ũndũ ũngĩ maneena." 
Job32:16 Nĩkũlya, nĩendeea kweteela matekũneena, na maũngamĩte mate ũndũ maweta?" 
Job32:17 O nakwa nĩngũũnenga ũsũngĩo wakwa, nĩngumya woni wakwa." 
Job32:18 Nũndũ nĩ na maũndũ maingĩ ma kũneena, veva ũla wĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa nũũnthing'ĩĩsya." 
Job32:19 Nalea kũkwata mwanya wa kũneena, nĩtembũka ta kĩkuu kya kĩthuma kyusĩe ndivai nzaũ." 
Job32:20 No nginya nĩneene nĩ kana nthũmũe, no nginya nathamye na ngĩsũngĩa." 
Job32:21 Ndiendeesya mũndũ o na wĩva, kana kwĩyendeesya kwa mũndũ o na wĩva." 
Job32:22 Nũndũ nyie ndyĩsĩ kwĩyendeesya, Mũmbi wakwa ndakese kũngany'a mĩtũkĩ.”" 
Job33:1 “We Yovu, yu ĩthukĩĩsye ũneeni wakwa, ĩthukĩĩsye nesa kyonthe kĩla ngũneena." 
Job33:2 Nĩnĩyũmbanĩtye kũneena, ngilĩlye kũneena." 
Job33:3 Ndeto syakwa syonthe nĩ sya w'o, na nĩneena w'o." 
Job33:4 Veva wa Ngai nĩwe wambũmbie, na veva wa Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe nũnengae thayũ." 
Job33:5 “Ethĩwa nũtonya nzũngĩe, vanga ndeto syaku nesa wĩ mbee wakwa, weta ũndũ ũkwenda." 
Job33:6 We, nakwa tũilyĩ ũndũ ũmwe mbee wa Ngai, ithyelĩ twoombiwe na yũmba." 
Job33:7 Kwoou ndwĩ na kĩtumi kya kũngĩa, kana ũsũanĩe nyie nĩndonya ũkũnenga thĩna." 
Job33:8 “Nũneenete ndyĩw'a, na ngew'a ndeto syaku." 
Job33:9 Nũneenete ũkasya, ‘Nyie ndi na ĩvĩtyo, vai ũthũku nĩkĩte, ndi na ĩvĩtyo na vai naĩ nthĩnĩ wakwa." 
Job33:10 Ngai nũmanthaa itumi sya kũnthĩny'a, na andalaa ta nĩ mũmaitha wake." 
Job33:11 Nĩwovaa maũũ makwa na mĩtĩ ya kwova andũ, na kũsyaĩĩsya kw'onthe kũla nĩendaa.’" 
Job33:12 Ĩndĩ eka ngũtavye, We Yovu wĩ na ĩvĩtyo, Ngai nĩ mũnene mbee wa andũ." 
Job33:13 Wĩsikatĩa Ngai kyaũ ũyasya, ‘Ndesũngĩa ĩkũlyo yakwa o na yĩmwe.’?" 
Job33:14 O na vala Ngai aneenaa kwa nzĩa syĩ kĩvathũkany'o, vai mũndũ ũmanyaa ũndũ Ngai wasya." 
Job33:15 Ũtukũ, yĩla andũ makomete vyũ, Ngai nũneenaa namo ndotonĩ kana mawoninĩ." 
Job33:16 Nĩvo ĩndĩ ũtumaa mew'a ũndũ ũkwasya, na aimatelemya na mokany'o." 
Job33:17 Aneenaa nĩ kana atume andũ maekana na naĩ, na aimavetangĩa kwĩthĩwa me na mĩkathĩĩo." 
Job33:18 Ngai ndetĩkĩla andũ manangwe; nũmovoasya kuma kĩkw'ũnĩ. 
Job33:19 Ngai nũkanasya mũndũ kwa kũtuma awaa, na kũtuma ethĩwa na kyalya mwĩĩnĩ." 
Job33:20 Ũwau nũtumaa mũndũ aemwa nĩ lĩu, o na lĩu ũla mũseo nĩwĩw'aa ate kũwenda." 
Job33:21 Mwĩĩ wake nũthelaa vyũ, ũkethĩa mavĩndĩ make ala matanoonekaa nĩmaumĩla." 
Job33:22 Ethĩawa e vakuvĩ mũno na mbũa, thayũ wake wĩthĩawa ũthengee ala maetae kĩkw'ũ." 
Job33:23 Nĩvatonyeka mũlaĩka ũmwe katĩ wa alaĩka aingĩ ma Ngai akoka kũmũtetheesya, alaĩka ala malilikanasya andũ ũndũ ũla waĩlĩte." 
Job33:24 Mũlaĩka ũsu aneenaa na tei akasya, ‘Mũlekyei! Ndethi nthĩ ya ala akw'ũ, nĩna kĩndũ kya kũĩva ovow'e." 
Job33:25 Eka mwĩĩ wake ũseũve ta wa mũndũ wa mũika, na ayĩthĩwa e na vinya ta yĩla waĩ wa mũika.’" 
Job33:26 Mũndũ ũsu avoya, Ngai akamũsũngĩa, akathaithaa Ngai e na ũtanu. Ngai akatuma ethĩwa e mũlũngalu ĩngĩ." 
Job33:27 Akaina e mbee wa andũ akyasya; ‘Nĩnĩvĩtĩtye; nĩnĩkĩte ũla ũte ũseo, ĩndĩ Ngai nũndekeete." 
Job33:28 Nĩwambonokisye ndikathi nthĩ ya ala akw'ũ, nyie nĩ o thayũ.’" 
Job33:29 “Ngai nĩwĩkaa mũndũ maũndũ asu onthe, mavinda kwa mavinda." 
Job33:30 Nũtangĩĩaa thayũ wa mũndũ, na aimũnenga ũtanu wa kwĩthĩwa thayũ." 
Job33:31 We Yovu ĩthukĩĩsye nesa, ĩw'a ũndũ ngũkwĩa; vindya na ũyĩeka nĩneene." 
Job33:32 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa wĩ na ũndũ ũkwenda kwasya weta, nĩngwenda ũkũsĩĩa kana ndwĩ na ĩvĩtyo." 
Job33:33 Ethĩwa ti ũu, mbĩthukĩĩsye; kilya, na nĩngũũmanyĩsya ũndũ ũtonya kwĩthĩwa wĩ mũĩ.”" 
Job34:1 Nĩvo ĩndĩ Eliu waendeeie kũneena ayasya atĩĩ," 
Job34:2 “Inyw'ĩ andũ oĩ, ĩthukĩĩsyei ndeto syakwa, teai matũ, inyw'ĩ andũ mwĩ na ũmanyi." 
Job34:3 Kũtũ nĩkw'o kũsamaa ndeto, o tondũ ũĩmĩ ũsamaa lĩu." 
Job34:4 Tũnyuvei ũndũ ũla waĩlĩte; nĩtwĩmanyĩsyei ũndũ ũla mũseo. 
Job34:5 Yovu aĩtye, ‘Nyie nĩ mũlũngalu, ĩndĩ Ngai nũmbatĩte ũsili wa katĩ." 
Job34:6 O na kau nĩ mũlũngalu, ndalawa ta mũkengani; kĩtau kyakwa kĩivoaa, o na kau ndi na ĩvĩtyo.’" 
Job34:7 “Ũla ũilyĩ Yovu nũũ, mũndũ wĩ kĩvũthya kingĩ," 
Job34:8 wĩkalanasya na andũ ala mekaa naĩ, na kũtindany'a na andũ athũku?" 
Job34:9 Nĩkwĩthĩwa aneenete akasya, ‘Vai ũunĩko mũndũ ũkwataa yĩla wamwendeesya Ngai.’" 
Job34:10 “Kwoou mbĩthukĩĩsyei, inyw'ĩ andũ mwĩ na ũĩ; Ngai ndatonya kwĩka naĩ, Ngai Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe ndavĩtasya." 
Job34:11 Nũĩvaa mũndũ kwĩanana na wĩa wake; nũmũtuvaa kwĩanana na mwĩkalo wake. 
Job34:12 Nĩw'o ki kana Ngai ndekaa naĩ, Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe ndelelũkasya sila wa katĩ." 
Job34:13 Nũũ ũla wanyuvie Ngai ethĩwe na ũtonyi nthĩ yonthe? Nũũ ũla wamũnengie ũtonyi wa kũũngamĩa nthĩ yonthe nũũ? 
Job34:14 Ta kethĩwa nĩ mũvango wa Ngai, na aivetanga veva na thayũ wake ĩũlũ wa nthĩ," 
Job34:15 syũmbe syonthe no ithele vyũ ĩmwe, nake mũndũ aisyoka kĩtoonĩ." 
Job34:16 “Ethĩwa wĩ na ũmanyi, ĩw'a ndeto ii, ĩthukĩĩsye ũndũ ngwasya." 
Job34:17 Nĩkũlya, Ngai nũtonya kũsumbĩka ethĩwa nũmenaa sila wa katĩ? Naku nũtonya kũtw'ĩkĩthya ũla mũlũngalu na wĩ ũtonyi kwĩthĩwa e mũvĩtany'a?" 
Job34:18 Ngai nũtavasya asumbĩ akamea atĩĩ, ‘Inyw'ĩ mũi vata,’ na o ta ũu ayĩa anene me ndaĩa atĩĩ, ‘Inyw'ĩ mwĩ athũku.’" 
Job34:19 Ngai ndendeeasya anene, na ndendeeasya athwii mbee wa ngya, nũndũ nĩwe mũmbi wa onthe." 
Job34:20 Ũtukũ katĩ nĩmakusaa matataĩĩe; Ngai nũkũnaa andũ makathela, nũvetangaa andũ me ũtonyi ateũtũmĩa vinya wa andũ." 
Job34:21 “Nĩkwĩthĩwa metho make masyaĩĩasya nzĩa sya andũ, na nĩwonaa maũndũ onthe ala mekaa." 
Job34:22 Vai vandũ ve wiki kana kĩvindu kĩkamu, vala andũ ala athũkũ matonya kũmwĩvitha Ngai." 
Job34:23 Ngai nde na vata wa kũvanga ĩvinda, yĩla andũ matonya kũthi akamasilĩle." 
Job34:24 Nũminaa andũ me ũtonyi atakũlĩtye ĩũlũ woo, na ayĩkĩa andũ angĩ vandũ voo." 
Job34:25 Kwoou nũndũ Ngai nĩwĩsĩ maũndũ ala mekaa, nũmavetangaa na kũmamina ũtukũ." 
Job34:26 Nũmakanasya nũndũ wa mothũku moo, andũ onthe masyaĩĩsye," 
Job34:27 nũndũ nĩmaekie kũmũatĩĩa, na mayĩtĩkĩla kũatĩĩa o na ĩmwe ya nzĩa syake." 
Job34:28 Nĩmatumie kĩĩo kya ngya kĩmũvikĩa, na kwoou eew'a kĩĩo kya ala mathĩnaw'a." 
Job34:29 “Ethĩwa Ngai nĩwavindya, nũũ ũtonya kũmũtw'a mũvĩtany'a? Ethĩwa nĩwavitha ũthyũ wake, nũũ ũtonya kũmwona? Ĩndĩ e na ũtonyi ĩũlũ wa mũndũ na ĩũlũ wa nthĩ," 
Job34:30 nĩ kana asiĩĩe mũndũ ũla ũtamũkĩaa Ngai ndakasumbĩke, na o ta ũu amũsiĩĩe ndakaseũvĩsye andũ mũteo." 
Job34:31 “Mũndũ akaneena na Ngai akamwĩa atĩĩ, ‘Nĩnĩvĩtĩtye, ĩndĩ ndikeka naĩ ĩngĩ," 
Job34:32 manyĩsye kĩla ndatonya kwona; ethĩwa nĩnĩvĩtĩtye, ndikeka ũu ĩngĩ.’" 
Job34:33 Nĩkũlya, Ngai akalea kũmũkany'a alea kũalyũla ngoo yake? Nue waĩlĩte kũnyuva ti inyie; kwoou weta ũndũ wĩsĩ." 
Job34:34 “Andũ me na ũmanyi na andũ me na ũĩ, ala mambĩthukĩĩasya makambĩaa atĩĩ," 
Job34:35 ‘Yovu aneenaa ate na ũĩ, ndeto syake iina ũmanyi.’" 
Job34:36 Nenda kethĩwa Yovu nũsilĩlwa nginya mũminũkĩlyo, nũndũ asũngĩaa ta mũndũ mũthũku." 
Job34:37 Yovu ongelaa ũng'endu naĩnĩ yake, e katĩ waitũ nũvũthasya Ngai, nĩwongelaa ndeto syake sya kũleana na Ngai.”" 
Job35:1 Eliu nĩwaendeeie kũneena ayasya: 
Job35:2 “Atĩĩ Yovu, we wĩona ũndũ ũũ nĩ waĩlĩte, kũneena ũyasya, ‘Ndi na ĩvĩtyo mbee wa Ngai?’" 
Job35:3 Kwoou wĩkũlya, ‘Ve ũseo mwaũ kwakwa, nalea kwĩka naĩ nĩkwataa ũseo mwaũ?’" 
Job35:4 Nĩngũũsũngĩa, we wĩ na anyanyae maku." 
Job35:5 Sisya matunĩ wone, sisya wone ũndũ matu me ĩũlũ!" 
Job35:6 Ethĩwa nĩweeka naĩ, ũu wĩkaa Ngai ata? Weeka naĩ mavinda maingĩ, ũu nĩwĩthĩawa wamwĩka ũndũ?" 
Job35:7 Ethĩwa wĩ mũlũngalu, ũnengae Ngai kyaũ? Kana nĩ kyaũ Ngai wosaa kuma kw'okonĩ kwaku?" 
Job35:8 Ũthũku waku nũtumaa andũ angĩ taku mathĩna, na ũseo waku nĩwĩkaa andũ angĩ nesa." 
Job35:9 “Andũ nĩmaĩaa nũndũ wa kũthĩnw'a mũno; nĩmekaĩlaa mũndũ amatethye kuma ũtonyinĩ wa ũla wĩ vinya. 
Job35:10 Ĩndĩ vai mũndũ ũkũlasya, ‘Aĩva Ngai Mũmbi wakwa, ũla ũtumaa andũ matana ũtukũ," 
Job35:11 ũla ũtũnengae ũĩ mwingĩ kwĩ wa nyamũ sya kĩthekanĩ, na kũtuma twĩthĩwa na ũmanyi mwingĩ kwĩ wa nyũnyi?’" 
Job35:12 Andũ mamwĩkaĩla, ndasũngĩaa, nũndũ me ngathĩĩo na nĩ athũku." 
Job35:13 Kwa w'o Ngai ndew'aa kĩĩo kya mana, Mwene Ũtonyi W'onthe ndakĩthukĩĩasya." 
Job35:14 Ngai akakũsũngĩa ata ĩvindanĩ yĩla we ũkwasya kana ndũmwene, na kana ĩkoani yaku yĩ mbee wake na no nginya ũmweteele?" 
Job35:15 Wĩsũanĩa kana Ngai ndakanasya, na kana ndaatĩanĩaa na naĩ." 
Job35:16 Kwoou Yovu wĩneenaa ndeto sya mana, wĩneena ndeto mbingĩ ũte na ũmanyi.”" 
Job36:1 Eliu nĩwaendeeie kũneena ayasya atĩĩ," 
Job36:2 “Ũmĩanĩsya nakwa o kavinda kanini na nĩngũkwony'a kana ve maũndũ maingĩ naĩlĩte kũneena kwondũ wa Ngai. 
Job36:3 Nĩngũtũmĩa ũĩ wakwa mwingĩ, nĩ kana ngwony'e kana Ngai Mũmbi wakwa nĩ mũlũngalu." 
Job36:4 Manya kana ndeto syakwa nĩ syaw'o, mũndũ wĩ na ũĩ wa w'o e vamwe naku." 
Job36:5 “Ĩthukĩĩsye, Ngai e ũtonyi, ĩndĩ ndavũthasya andũ; vai ũndũ ũtamanyaa!" 
Job36:6 Ndaekaa andũ athũku maendee kwĩkala thayũ, ĩndĩ nũnengae ala mathĩnaw'a kĩla kĩmaĩlĩte." 
Job36:7 Nũsũvĩaa ala alũngalu, nũmanengae mwanya wa kũsumbĩka ta asumbĩ, na kũtuma manengwa ndaĩa tene na tene." 
Job36:8 Ĩndĩ ethĩwa nĩove na mbĩngũ, maithĩna nũndũ wa maũndũ ala mekĩte," 
Job36:9 Ngai nũmonasya meko moo mathũku, na ngathĩĩo syoo." 
Job36:10 Nũtumaa methukĩĩsya ũkany'o wake, na kũmeaĩa maumbũle mothũku moo."
